name: Eduardo Verastegui, Sound of Freedom producer
subject: Locked in a basement. Sold online. Then rescued.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1108129/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvSlgyNFQ2S2ZxMg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDE/LbmNsYmdCU2Fabw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTN3czU1lXOGFscw/gaVW5xA/sft3a293157)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Imagine this... You’re twelve years old. You’ve been lured online, taken from your home, and locked in a freezing basement miles from anywhere. You’re being sold to strangers on the internet. Used. Broadcast. Passed around from one monster to the next. And every night, you lie awake in the dark asking: _“Will anyone come for me?”_ **For Alice... the answer was yes.** But for thousands of other children still in captivity, the answer hasn’t come yet. They are still waiting. And good people like you and me may be their only chance. **[**Patriot, will you be an Agent of Mercy for trafficked children like Alice by making a tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
My name is Eduardo Verástegui, and I founded the Sound of Freedom Foundation to rescue children like Alice. **You may know me as the producer of the film**** _Sound of Freedom._****That film awakened the world to the brutal reality of child trafficking.** The movie itself was never the end goal. It was just the beginning. Since the film’s release, I’ve met with world leaders, supported sting operations, and helped expose cartels running trafficking networks. I’ve seen unspeakable horror... and I’ve seen courageous people bring children home. Now, I’m asking you to help us bring home the next.
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
You may be wondering: _How did Alice make it home?_ A Florida-based cyber-investigator — part of our extended network — spotted a familiar username in a trafficking forum. He followed the trail. It led to a match on a missing child: **Alice.** He contacted the FBI. They traced the location. Raided the site. **Rescued Alice. Alive.** She is safe today and healing. Because **someone stepped up** when no one else could. **This is why we launched**** _Operation Search and Rescue._** It’s our most ambitious initiative to date — connecting undercover investigators, cyber intelligence analysts, and law enforcement to: ️✅ Expose child trafficking networks
✅ Rescue enslaved boys and girls
✅ Put predators behind bars for life We have the tools. We have the expertise. What we _really_ need is... YOU. **Patriot, with your support today, you can directly fund this effort. And thanks to a Matching Grant, your gift will go twice as far!** Right now, a $10,000 Search and Rescue Matching Grant is in place to launch our next wave of operations. _That means your donation of $35 becomes $70... $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... and so on..._ But time is running out. This match is limited. The next operation depends on your support. **[**So please, Patriot, make your life-saving gift today to the Sound of Freedom Foundation and become an Agent of Mercy for children like Alice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
This isn’t charity... It’s a rescue mission. Every dollar sends trained agents into the dark places where traffickers hide children. Every dollar brings us closer to the next rescue. These children can’t call for help. But you can answer anyway. Will you be an Agent of Mercy for God’s children? Many blessings, Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation **P.S.**_Sound of Freedom_ gave a voice to the children who were silenced. With your help, we can give that same hope to children still waiting to be rescued.
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1108129/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDE/LbmNsYmdCU2Fabw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTN3czU1lXOGFscw/gaVW5xA/sauc9c1cf25)

name: George Whitesides (personal)
subject: 7 donations from 18326
body:
Hi Peter,

I’m glad I caught you before ringing in the new year. I just got off the phone with my finance director, and she tells me that we are a grassroots surge away from hitting our final FEC goal of the year.

I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team this week -- please know that I don’t take your support for granted. If you’ve been holding out for the right time to donate, this is it:

**[Will you chip in $3 and become one of the 7 donors from 18326 we need to hit this important goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122407825/592483004/148511826?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4NThkYi1hNGU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLb0wiZ1Tfr7SM423G0IvVR3AsRe_U-oiXO0Mw_rrAw=)**

The challenges our communities have faced this year are stark. As I was sworn into Congress in January, wildfires ravaged Southern California. And in Washington, I fought against the GOP majority who instead of putting our differences aside to work for Americans, decided to put their self-interest ahead of affordability for working families.

There are many challenges ahead. But the good news is that in 2026, we have an opportunity to change the tone and hold the Trump Administration accountable with the House majority.

It simply doesn’t happen without holding the line in CA-27. Three seats separate House control. We’re preparing to revamp our voter outreach efforts to reach the thousands of new voters folded into the district after Prop 50 before our GOP challenger can reach them.

Your support made the difference when I flipped this seat in 2024. I need to count on you again to rise above the noise, protect this seat, and get real results for Southern California.

If you’re able, $3 or any amount would help us report a strong year-end fundraising number to the FEC: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122407829/592483007/148511826?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4NThkYi1hNGU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLb0wiZ1Tfr7SM423G0IvVR3AsRe_U-oiXO0Mw_rrAw=)**

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

George

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122407835/592483013/148511826?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY4NThkYi1hNGU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLb0wiZ1Tfr7SM423G0IvVR3AsRe_U-oiXO0Mw_rrAw=)****
---

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=g1H%2BUMkUHZXJYt6BhtoDafXt32x460OsS7t87QHIi9seZMis3iOBExonh8%2FSwPXK900E6NejY%2F5SvFn58gV7YDoVU1ytmgKquNjCBrE5uMXr7YTAofECWOH252SCJmhpMQ6Ov6%2BxGY36czP4D1NADIIk10iFDHZJ2uwq17qbYj1KANjNqg5BTN98RivDlFIIwC6MNIzYppdz1XC4SBC5uEBYHhOtbgmHtrif6gxvWAwXdNuldIFiObTJFnDsbBeUjzlM%2B3t%2Bp6QdwrwsQtgUlX6hw8ql5CSA27C%2BqqCSFz94jcsCAEuObdRK%2BupOGaspkY74R7Al72e9DIyTo749W6hbuIDSHMrejROzdG9qSH2EPUwIFHiYf4s3HO5QctVML9R8AosWMg0p1QZjLQ0twgJjmVSOmrxtzQxsehC%2BZWlp9ICY3uoF3EQSmT2RJsWb).

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My big plans for the evening:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2746%2E4032634%2E9nrktr)
---
Happy New Year’s Eve. Whether you’re staying in tonight or counting down to the new year out on the town, I hope you’re enjoying yourself. Bruce, Bailey and I will be spending New Year's Eve the same way we always do — watching Casablanca for the zillionth time. I know, I know. At this point maybe it’s the zillionth-bajillionth time. But still, every time I watch it, I feel hopeful. Watching how Rick, Ilsa, Lazlo, and Sam confront cynicism with hope, resist the oppressive forces of World War II, and make personal sacrifices for the greater good of the world during a fearful and uncertain moment in history — I see this movie as an inspiring call to action. As we turn the page to a transformational new year tomorrow, a similar chill of fear and uncertainty hangs in the air. People are rightly afraid. Afraid for their families and neighbors. Afraid for immigrants. Afraid for our children. Afraid for trans people. Afraid for people feeling so squeezed to only barely get by. Afraid for our country. Afraid for our planet. The future of our country hangs in the balance with next year’s elections, and it comes to us to decide what we will do with this moment in history. I’m choosing to believe that the dreams we imagine for a better world are still possible — and worth fighting for — on this New Year's Eve. Together, we can choose hope over fear, courage over timidity, and dreams over cynicism. It’s going to take hard work in 2026. But I know this team is up to the task. And I’m asking if you can chip in to help keep up the fight, and the hope. [**Please make a donation, if you can, to help hit our fundraising goal before tonight’s last FEC deadline of the year. $28 or whatever you can contribute would go a long way to help make our movement even stronger for 2026 and beyond.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3308?amount=28&t=8&akid=2746%2E4032634%2E9nrktr) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

body:
That’s the donation I’m asking you to make before midnight to support my campaign for governor of New Mexico.

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3613?t=1&akid=6601%2E400544%2ErWI18r)
Just $5, friend.
That’s the donation I’m asking you to make before midnight to support my campaign for governor of New Mexico.
| [Pitch in $5 ](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3614?amount=5&t=2&akid=6601%2E400544%2ErWI18r)
---
Dec. 31 is our last major fundraising deadline of the year, and with GOP megadonors already lining up to buy this race, it's crucial we show the strength of our grassroots campaign.
$5 will help us reach our ambitious goal of raising $50,000 ahead of tonight's deadline, helping us fight back against the flood of far-right attacks that are sure to come our way.
$5 will help us launch TV and digital ads, ramp up our statewide organizing, and continue traveling to every corner of the state to build undeniable support from New Mexicans everywhere.
**But we still need a lot of supporters to chip in $5 between now and our end-of-month deadline, friend.**
**_[So please, will you make a donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3613?t=3&akid=6601%2E400544%2ErWI18r)_**
| [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3613?t=4&akid=6601%2E400544%2ErWI18r)
---
Be fierce,

Deb

Seth

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Last Chance: Just $1 to become a Founding Donor for James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter -- This will be our final ask of 2025.
We’re close to our goal, but we still need a few more people to make their first donation to our campaign before midnight.
**[The number of donations we report after this deadline really matters. So we’re lowering our ask to see if you can give just $1. It may seem insignificant, but every donation — no matter the amount — sends a powerful message about the depth of grassroots support for James.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251231-3-ak&t=1&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y)
[ CONTRIBUTE $1](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251231-3-ak&t=2&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y)
It may seem like one dollar is just a drop in the bucket when super PACs are already spending $10 million on this race. But it all adds up. The only way to take back Texas from billionaires and their puppet politicians is with all of us doing our part.
$1 because we need an unprecedented number of contributions to send a powerful message when we close the books on this FEC deadline.
$1 because James is statistically tied with Cornyn and Paxton in the latest polling, and that means the attack ads will definitely be coming soon in an effort to try to tear him down.
$1 because this is the last chance to say you were a Founding Donor for James Talarico’s U.S. Senate campaign — before the ball drops on 2025.
**[Please contribute any amount — even $1 — to help us finish 2025 strong. Your donation could be the one that pushes us over the top before we close our books on the final FEC deadline of 2025.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251231-3-ak&t=3&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y)
[ CONTRIBUTE $1](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251231-3-ak&t=4&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y)
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=364_1347274_LdhS3Y&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=364%2E1347274%2ELdhS3Y).

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: We believe in respecting the folks who are on our email list.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
At midnight tonight, we’ll close our books on our fundraising for the year and then submit a report to the FEC.
After that, our numbers will become public and everyone—reporters, our opponents, even Donald Trump himself—will be able to see our numbers.
**Republican Super PACs could see our fundraising and decide whether or not to spend against Alexandria** based on how strong they perceive our campaign to be. In 2020, this was the second most expensive House race in the country—our opponent raised and spent more than $10 million. So we need to be prepared.
We will never try to scare you into donating. We believe in respecting the folks who are on our email list.
[ But we will politely ask: can you donate $5 ahead of our deadline to help us reach our end-of-year goal in just a few hours?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251231-2.DRQGLS&refcode=em20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251231-2.DRQGLS&refcode=em20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251231-2.DRQGLS&refcode=em20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)**
Every single donation truly makes a difference because Alexandria doesn’t curry favor from billionaires or spend time on the phone asking wealthy donors for big checks.
Thank you so much for being here, whether you can donate today or not,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251231-2?refcode=em20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=10504_2526796_e4_iXe&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=10504%2E2526796%2Ee4_iXe)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20251231-10504-P_FND_EGR_GRM)

name: Rep. Zoe Lofgren
subject: Just hours away from our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
We’re currently less than 10 hours out from our end-of-year FEC filing deadline.
This is a real deadline — the amount we raise will shape how prepared we are to defend our democracy, flip the House blue, and block Trump’s extremist agenda.
And the stakes are very real:
Republicans are redrawing maps in their favor to steal Democratic seats.
They’re cutting hundreds of billions of dollars from critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP.
And they’re attempting to rewrite the events of January 6th, 2021 — a painful day for our nation, and one that I have fought hard to hold Trump and Republicans accountable for.
So now that you know more about this deadline and what’s at stake, can I count on you to chip in $25 before midnight tonight to help us finish the year strong and head into 2026 ready to fight?
CHIP IN $25 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-12-31_EOY_FID_ES-37438]
Happy New Year’s Eve, Peter. Thank you for standing with me.
Zoe Lofgren
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Before the year comes to a close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
| |

Friend, As this year comes to a close, I wanted to reach out personally. In a few hours, we’ll turn the page to 2026. I’ll be ringing in the New Year with my family, but tonight also marks a critical moment for this campaign and for the vision we are building together. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122409734/592496227/2090747700?refcode=251231_sm_eoqfinal_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDhiOTBjYS1hNmU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g1VINWeylvIiTbL5Mw8I-IWoG6eBSRS4gg8kC_7QAyc=) Right now, too many families in Massachusetts are doing everything right and still falling behind. Rent keeps rising. Healthcare costs eat into paychecks. Energy bills spike. Meanwhile, the people at the very top keep pulling further ahead. That’s why I’ve put forward my American Affordability Agenda: 3 for 30. Three clear commitments, and a counter to Project 2025:
* Housing is a human right
* Healthcare is a human right
* Education is a human right

This is about offering a real vision forward, one that lowers costs, expands opportunity, and puts working families back at the center of our economy. And we’ll pay for it through a national wealth tax on mega-millionaires and by closing tax loopholes that favor corporations, the wealthy, and the well-connected.

We’re in the final hours of our end-of-quarter deadline, and how we finish this year determines the strength of this campaign heading into 2026. **[If you can give before midnight, you’ll help make sure this campaign has the strength it needs to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122409735/592496228/2090747700?refcode=251231_sm_eoqfinal_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDhiOTBjYS1hNmU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g1VINWeylvIiTbL5Mw8I-IWoG6eBSRS4gg8kC_7QAyc=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122409736/592496229/1375639745?amp;refcode=251231_sm_eoqfinal&refcode=251231_sm_eoqfinal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDhiOTBjYS1hNmU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g1VINWeylvIiTbL5Mw8I-IWoG6eBSRS4gg8kC_7QAyc=)

Thank you for being part of this campaign and for believing in what we’re building together. I’m grateful for your support.
Wishing you and your loved ones a safe, healthy, and hopeful New Year.
— Seth

Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. From: Adam Schiff
Date: Wednesday, December 31, 2025
Subject: We can’t lose focus now

Derek,

This year has tested us. Trump has continued dismantling the government,
executing Project 2025 in ways we knew he would. Congressional Republicans
refuse to take accountability. Americans are fighting for their economic
survival.

In the midst of this, it’s easy to lose focus. Trump is skilled at
distraction, creating headlines to keep us stuck in a chaotic cycle.

But we are beginning to turn the tide. In every election since last year,
the pendulum has swung dramatically towards the Democratic Party. We must
keep the momentum going.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20251231_PM2_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9351%2E5257348%2EoBbPvd ]That’s why I’m asking for your support before our end-of-quarter

body:
Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
#
Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And just last month, it helped elect both Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill. Thank you.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $21. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before the final FEC deadline of 2025 hits at midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251231-2-160&t=1&akid=34849%2E3013755%2E0GjO4p)

| | **Cybertruck’s AI Exposed In Raw Footage**
---
| [ Jaw-Dropping Video ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=3741c44b7b994d91a61438b59de09029&_e=IN_Mv0sWqwooqJdIdv4Xsp6d7G9h8fKpnlx4ALORvdX180Ib7HZwLYCneyPdSVxZVX-LrL1JSWBUCoXKreF-YS1cdrOroVZE1A6NbYQiFzWn6os9gtqkHq2O_ejk77OdbHS-3YShrqGpCs0dHbmqZ7LbYd-nl6Ch3VW378Qq1CzRRf_DRoC-JWtUZ6myyNTmHQKxLwkcs-KE4n0WMgU-k6t4g2RMBrOD0g2eFeYj-HdOkxmXkSm2JPzkkGxXPpXTkTKasZtbWIbSfvMh5PHS3TiBAlJcrTf9sazj0VDzCLLiPC2O4p1TEAfua9aYpJl5UcgACiehy4Am0V33M-dMPsTOiaR5exCHicasauqNhxU66MgWs8dt1lxWQSrG94D_FTXtK-LoxoEa7IoCpZCsGe7Rrc38477fq1wZDhcEStHp3fgtjApZw9LDWOrKMli1hrTRHfQ6MpMUt1bTGJcHoxKf6CzwuW15efM-7li7VoIZAHXSyo4O5gCcFTeO1h8DFWsBIGiIeNq54xqj74slzoTQyPtSO90K6ybQPcFFA1pKSc-OQRuU-Cz7iLMMM_zcgPpDUAZ-tQXXNdSd_Wio6A%3D%3D)
---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Before bed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it’s the last night of December and just hours from my last FEC reporting deadline of 2025.
I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. And MAGA is lining up millions to flip this seat and drown out the truth with disinformation.
That’s the fight ahead. And I need you by my side.
Before you turn in: [**Can you rush $5 before midnight to help me win in Georgia?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251231-3-f&t=1&akid=1358%2E5691347%2EIUKBdg)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251231-3-f&t=2&akid=1358%2E5691347%2EIUKBdg)**
When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country.
Many people said it couldn’t be done. But you believed — not just in me, but in the idea that Georgia could lead, and that our Republic is worth defending.
Then we won. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats.
Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation.
Americans are now living in fear of their own government.
I’m fighting back.
And I need you with me.
Please, if you can make it work, donate what you can before my midnight FEC deadline.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251231-3-f&t=3&akid=1358%2E5691347%2EIUKBdg)**
As always,
Jon Ossoff

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: While most people are celebrating, Republicans are plotting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to start 2026 strong.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251231-5768-footer&t=1&akid=5768%2E420207%2EuainNd)
Hi Peter, it’s Pramila.
I’ll keep this quick, because I know you’re probably busy this New Year’s Eve!
While most people are celebrating, Republicans are plotting the next steps of their escalating authoritarian agenda. If we want to be in a strong position to fight back and take back the House in 2026, we need to start by meeting tonight’s end-of-year fundraising deadline.
Can I count on you to chip in at the link below to help us reach our $30,000 goal? We’re so close, and we need one last push before midnight to get over the top.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: It really, really matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I don't love this
Peter,
We’re just hours away from our critical FEC deadline. If you’re anything like me, you’ve probably gotten a lot of messages like this one asking for your support. And most will say the same thing: _this deadline matters._
But here’s why it _really,_ _really_ matters for this unique Senate race in Georgia, where I am the only Democratic incumbent Senator seeking reelection in a state Trump won:
1. **WE HAVE TO SHOW STRENGTH.** There are three Republican candidates running against me, and national Republicans have already spent millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking me. A strong showing proves to my opponents (and their Super PAC allies) — that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable.

2. **THERE’S NO TIME TO LOSE.** To win decisively, my team is already building a huge statewide campaign. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. That all takes resources right now. We’re building and we’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.

**[So please, if you can, use this link to contribute anything you can to Heartland Patriots and my reelection campaign in Georgia before our FEC deadline at midnight. I’d be grateful to have your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98993?refcode=em20251231-9888&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9888%2E614464%2EPS2A0e)**

---
I don’t love asking for money. I don’t think _anyone_ does.
But the reality is I have to. I can’t win without you.
_Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like mine have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from Day One.
_I need your help, Peter!_
**I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick.
Yes, this election will be tough.
But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
**[Please, consider making a contribution to Heartland Patriots and my reelection before our critical FEC deadline at midnight. Every donation counts. name: Jane Fonda
subject: until midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| I know you’re probably settling in to ring in the New Year, so I’ll make this quick: I’m _endlessly_ grateful for the community we’ve built and the support you’ve shown our climate champions this year. This work isn’t easy, but you showed up again and again in 2025, and because of that, real change happened. **Before midnight, we have one final goal to reach:[$30,000 to close out the year strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122410950/592509394/2105508926?refcode=ea.f85fe04f-aae6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.f85fe04f-aae6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4NWZlMDRmLWFhZTYtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=knlw8JEOVbToJH2ZbDAD0j53VrrZiOIFjtl6-r9TZos=)** The year ahead will bring enormous pressure from Big Oil and from forces that want us to feel tired, divided, or afraid. _We’re already seeing reports that the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is funneling money into Republican House and Senate races ahead of the midterms._ That’s why the support we receive from people like you — especially to messages like this one — matters so much. It shapes how many candidates we can stand beside, how early we can give them the support they need, and how boldly we can step into the year ahead. **Every day, you remind me that hope is not a feeling. It’s an action.** People like you choose to act — to look powerful interests in the eye and say, “Not this time.” And because of your support, we’ve helped elect over 60 climate champions this year alone. Leaders who are brave, principled, and ready to fight for our communities, our freedoms, and a livable future for the generations coming after us. That kind of progress only happens when we come together and choose one another. **So if you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution before midnight tonight to help us carry this momentum into the New Year:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122410951/592509395/2105508926?refcode=ea.f85fe04f-aae6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.f85fe04f-aae6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4NWZlMDRmLWFhZTYtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=knlw8JEOVbToJH2ZbDAD0j53VrrZiOIFjtl6-r9TZos=)** With love and gratitude, and wishing you a peaceful New Year, Jane xx

clean_body: | I know you’re probably settling in to ring in the New Year, so I’ll make this quick: I’m endlessly grateful for the community we’ve built and the support you’ve shown our climate champions this year. This work isn’t easy, but you showed up again and again in 2025, and because of that, real change happened. Before midnight, we have one final goal to reach:= The year ahead will bring enormous pressure from Big Oil and from forces that want us to feel tired, divided, or afraid. We’re already seeing reports that the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is funneling money into Republican House and Senate races ahead of the midterms. That’s why the support we receive from people like you — especially to messages like this one — matters so much. It shapes how many candidates we can stand beside, how early we can give them the support they need, and how boldly we can step into the year ahead. Every day, you remind me that hope is not a feeling. It’s an action. People like you choose to act — to look powerful interests in the eye and say, “Not this time.” And because of your support, we’ve helped elect over 60 climate champions this year alone. Leaders who are brave, principled, and ready to fight for our communities, our freedoms, and a livable future for the generations coming after us. That kind of progress only happens when we come together and choose one another. So if you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution before midnight tonight to help us carry this momentum into the New Year:= With love and gratitude, and wishing you a peaceful New Year, Jane xx | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Sharice (personal)
subject: Before the ball drops
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sorry to reach out so close to New Year's

Hi — I’m sorry to reach out so close to New Year’s, but my finance team just let me know that we still have some catching up to do before our midnight deadline. As you probably know, there’s... a lot going on right now here at Team Sharice. Beyond the ordinary preparations for another competitive, expensive election year, we’re gearing up for a gerrymandering fight on January 12th so important, it could literally determine the House majority. But all of this isn’t going to be decided by me, or even by National Republicans. It’s going to be decided by you. Your response, your generosity, and your support will make all the difference. That’s how we’ve won four consecutive elections in a red state together. And it’s how we’ll win these big fights too. This is the moment I really need you by my side. If you could help us catch up to our goal before our books officially close at midnight, it would mean the world to me. This link will get your donation in before midnight:**_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davids-email-dec25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122411215/592512600/-851270824?refcode=email_123125_newyears&amounts=5,35,50,100,500,1000,3500&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWJmZTM0My1hYmU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wR7KgwNsgAwz5TufZVfaxK96ygzD3I30yAlljTL_haE=)_** Thank you so much — and Happy New Year. Sharice _Sent from my iPhone_

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Before the year ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
One last email
Hi friend,
I wanted to write to you one last time before the year comes to a close.
This election is about so much more than one seat. It’s about whether working families get a fair shot, whether health care becomes more affordable or more out of reach, and whether Washington finally starts listening to people instead of special interests.
This district can decide control of the House. That reality is not lost on Mike Johnson and House Republican leadership, and it’s why this race will be one of the toughest in the country.
Tonight marks the end of the quarter and the end of the year. How we finish now will set the tone for everything that comes next. It will determine how strong our campaign is as we head into the election year. This is also a FEC deadline, meaning our performance will be public.
If you’re able, I’m asking you to chip in one last time before the deadline. Your support helps us organize, reach voters, and keep fighting for the values we share.
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122411683/592519348/-200729754?refcode=251231_np_EOQ6_l1&ms=251231_np_EOQ6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM5ZWU3ZDEtYWNlNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6sXbiXr24CAe22epavqA5FidUjI38baDAmN6ZjgRZUg=)**
Thank you for believing in this campaign and in me. I don’t take that support lightly.
With gratitude,
Nellie

name: Dan Goldman
subject: I need to know if you’re with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I’m reaching out to humbly request your help. **Tonight marks a critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline for my campaign, and your support is vital, especially now.** Tonight is the final fundraising deadline of 2025, and it comes as MAGA Republicans and Donald Trump himself are making me the target of baseless attacks, all in an effort to silence me as I stand up against their corruption. I will always stand for what is right and just, but the attacks against me will only increase in the election year, and I need to know that you’re with me. **So I’m asking one last time before the year comes to a close. Will you make a contribution of any amount to help me continue fighting back?** You can use this link to pitch in: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsg-em-dec25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122411720/592520110/1749249761?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251231_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjhhMGZmMi1hY2U2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AD8NomcixMUxyxe71HivN2WzS3rU3N9HAgywFjMpNN0=) Thank you, and have a happy new year. Best, Dan

clean_body: | Peter, I’m reaching out to humbly request your help. Tonight marks a critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline for my campaign, and your support is vital, especially now. Tonight is the final fundraising deadline of 2025, and it comes as MAGA Republicans and Donald Trump himself are making me the target of baseless attacks, all in an effort to silence me as I stand up against their corruption. I will always stand for what is right and just, but the attacks against me will only increase in the election year, and I need to know that you’re with me. So I’m asking one last time before the year comes to a close. Will you make a contribution of any amount to help me continue fighting back? You can use this link to pitch in: = Thank you, and have a happy new year. Best, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: =?utf-8?B?SXp6aSwgRGF2aWTigJlzIHdpZmU=?=
subject: This is the job David’s been preparing for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seligman for AG,
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act]
Happy holidays!
I’m Izzi, David’s wife. While we’re at home trying to enjoy some post-holiday chill time, I thought I’d take a moment to reach out.
When David first told me he wanted to run for attorney general, I knew this wasn’t a political stepping stone for him. David’s running because he knows how important this office is in fighting for a better and brighter future for Colorado. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act]
He’s running to stand up for all those who are exploited and living in fear–immigrants, LGBTQ+ people and so many others.
To fight for basic rights–like the right to an abortion and the right to a union, both of which, as he often says, are essential to living a life of your choosing.
To hold polluters accountable for poisoning our air and water.
To protect working people from being preyed upon by the rich and powerful.
He’s not afraid to sue big corporations or stand up to political bullies, because he knows the stakes.
And he’s doing it not just for your family, but for ours too.
When I look at our girls, I see the future we’re trying to protect. I see the challenges they’ll have to deal with every day: algorithms designed to manipulate them and track them, a planet heating up because big polluters aren’t being held accountable, and an economy that is leaving working people behind even as a handful of the extremely wealthy grow even more profits and power. All that makes me super angry and scared. But it also makes us determined.
That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in before David’s end-of-year deadline to help him get across the finish line? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act]
END-OF-YEAR DEADLINE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act]
Thank you for being part of this fight with us.
With gratitude,
— Izzi
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act] As Executive Director of the nonprofit legal organization Towards Justice, David has taken on corporate giants like Amazon, Uber, and the biggest corporate landlords in the country—helping recover more than $70 million stolen from working people by powerful interests.
Now he’s running for attorney general to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.
He’s already doing the work. Visit SeligmanforAG.com [https://www.seligmanforag.com] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-25q4?refcode=x_251231_izzi_eoy6_act&recurring=1]

Paid for by Seligman for AG,
Jud Brown, Registered Agent

Denver, CO 80209
United States

subject: Read this CRITICAL question >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need you to take action.
| | Justice Sotomayor just asked the question we’ve ALL been wondering: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100545?t=6&akid=22432%2E878179%2EFbX6bX) _We KNOW_ Trump is the biggest threat to our democracy in American history...

_But we ALSO know_ that if we can’t pass the No Kings Act, we won’t be able to stop Trump from becoming an out-right KING.

**_This is serious._ Trump’s attacks against our Democracy are escalating RAPIDLY. There is only one thing we can immediately do to save our Democracy from authoritarianism, _but we must act fast:_**

[This is urgent. We need every Democrat in your state to rush $7 to BOOST us in the fight to pass the NO KINGS ACT and STOP TRUMP! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100545?t=7&akid=22432%2E878179%2EFbX6bX) | [$15,000 NO KINGS ACT GOAL: RUSH $7 TO STOP TRUMP FROM BEING A KING ABOVE THE LAW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100546?t=8&akid=22432%2E878179%2EFbX6bX)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22432%2E878179%2EFbX6bX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22432%2E878179%2EFbX6bX).**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: A bill we we can't let pass in any year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut:
(Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=123125_4&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=123125_4&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=123125_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=123125_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=123125_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=123125_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=123125_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=123125_4&amount=35]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=123125_4&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=123125_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=123125_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: EMILYs List
subject: One final (matched!) opportunity before the clock strikes midnight:
body:

name: Marie
subject: Before the countdown
body:
| | Happy New Year, Peter! It’s Marie with another note before the end of 2025.

We’ve had an incredible year of working together to deliver for hardworking families and rural communities here in Southwest Washington and nationwide, all while being underestimated by talking heads and undermined by extremists.

Throughout it all, my dedication to you and your family has never wavered.

Tonight’s our last chance of the year to fight back, set us up for 2026, and prove to everyone that our grassroots movement is still strong.

I’m counting on your support, Peter – can you contribute before midnight?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/december-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122414341/592528651/-1021815558?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251231_3_11&refcode2=9a0158a8-ade6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTAxNThhOC1hZGU2LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uHXx0GH7fuTZzJgkN36nFJWJuZFbTlDH99IvuFa_dKE=)

Thank you so much.

Marie

name: Alcala, Camille [EXTERNAL]
subject: refreshing ActBlue
body:
Hi there — it’s Camille.
I’m sending this from my phone because our offices are closed today, but I’m still keeping an eye on things as we head into the final hours before our FEC deadline.
I want to be 100% honest about what I’m seeing. Even with a few donations this morning, we’re still $2,130.90 short of our End-of-Quarter goal.
I’m sitting here refreshing ActBlue and watching donations come in, hoping to see a few more names pop up so we can get across the finish line before midnight.
If you’ve already made a donation — thank you so much.
If you haven’t (or want to renew your support) and are able to make a quick donation tonight, I’d be incredibly grateful. Even a small amount helps at this point.
My personal link is below and I hope to see your gift come in:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec25?refcode=&amount=]
Thank you so much for sticking with us — and for reading this so late in the day. I’ll be here watching the numbers until the deadline hits.
– Camille
Please excuse any typos, this email was sent from my iPhone

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these messages, please unsubscribe unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=8SMHw15e1ZH9V%2BBx6z99YwaEEpJFdtbMufVWvOi3i7C8KZhERCu%2FOh%2BQ%2BP9uySyV9v9XeVlO7x1NizK27qYmfGKFI7A7xuN5jAm3M0RuKdyFcgwrWjR%2BBZ%2BSPh8I6UmP67aFjBcf7gsVJ1bZlc2b9ihS96bPcUnGcEfdFqXpBSdTNJH3QzYPxSeRSPhXuQZ03QJWeTeGespd9brN5ooxa7mBkbukYjdkpQfyiSenAD7Fftj8fnqddT8u0gRb0kFKxsRVs%2FQaN%2F%2FHR%2BHmpG22l9wJujrEe4AkWv8s3Jgz47kJL%2BmHhYCjHVK0nqT4%2FzOpk9SOGbJrsDaKuJhHvfJEiwrHSsvXxRrLOO4EKtse0TIIZPlQ%2FtBpWd0rUeo5bMnOCSDOM%2BFTZNPRKa9BBdgfMgCdAa1e3RmACgIMsfq367c%3D .

subject: Stephen Colbert didn’t mince words!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Help turn viral momentum into real pressure

|
---
Peter, Stephen Colbert didn’t mince words when he spoke up to defend public broadcasting and now millions of Americans are paying attention.

**But we noticed you still never signed our critical “Defend NPR and PBS” petition, Peter...**

When comedians, journalists, and everyday people are all sounding the alarm, Congress _has_ to listen. But only if we show them just how big this movement really is.

**We’re pushing back and we’re SO CLOSE! But we’re still missing some Democrats in the fight, including you, Peter.**

With our midnight deadline fast approaching, we still need Democrats to step up and add their name to defend public media and free speech.

clean_body: Help turn viral momentum into real pressure | Peter, Stephen Colbert didn’t mince words when he spoke up to defend public broadcasting and now millions of Americans are paying attention. But we noticed you still never signed our critical “Defend NPR and PBS” petition, Peter... When comedians, journalists, and everyday people are all sounding the alarm, Congress has to listen. But only if we show them just how big this movement really is. We’re pushing back and we’re SO CLOSE! But we’re still missing some Democrats in the fight, including you, Peter. With our midnight deadline fast approaching, we still need Democrats to step up and add their name to defend public media and free speech. [[12 MORE SIGNATURES NEEDED IN YOUR AREA] Add your name to help turn viral momentum into real pressure so we can defend public media from Trump’s authoritarian agenda! »]() | -Democracy On The Line -FORWARDED MESSAGE BELOW- Peter, this moment matters: Stephen Colbert is going VIRAL for speaking out in support of public media organizations like NPR and PBS! This surge of attention gives us a narrow but powerful window to act! As Trump tries to CENSOR and SHUT DOWN public media organizations and journalists entirely, we MUST defend free speech! Thanks! Democracy On The Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Team WFP
subject: Fwd: Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter — passing along this message from Elizabeth Warren because it speaks to the power we’re building from the ground up. We’re so close to hitting our stretch goal of $130,000 to be raised by midnight tonight, and every single contribution helps us keep organizing, showing up, and building power where it matters most. 2026 is coming fast, with huge elections ahead — and it’s going to take all of us to meet the moment. **[Please make a contribution of any amount that is meaningful to you to help get us over the finish line and end the year strong.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6REQ_CR6XO57pGLKxRzov-QSyG6K3tLhbob6vTP5vuBzXO-lN3ylpqvrbne-XxDkrv8jXnUnXYP6B_AZ-NT-ZIBqOrFfuxf_4P0yAW0oeAVhuANlJBFXpyt2Kd_rXR0UKHb6Zhk1QltUeBvGh-VVBNXuEZNzhY12gwFHu0k-jtDGk_gGSkQM5oWioQad18YdTRNE1O0e_843u_FCA6BNa3MMMVPh4lY83fMKfG7o0lvBgz4hPwkmB4P7IsXR5RhQL5rodM8Sk6JiywSLi8YB5Qo4/4mx/0Fl4kA-pSKem7p6c6GNRhA/h0/h001.BZwcRjzLYO_62IxBij0BTBFFRYJ4EXU0uo4QSb5UVq4)** — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Elizabeth Warren (via Working Families Party)**
Date: Mon, Dec 29, 2025
Subject: Are you with us? Hello Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. And as I work in the Senate to put political and economic power in the hands of the people — where it belongs — the Working Families Party has been one of my greatest allies. **The Working Families Party has been on the front lines of the fight for racial and economic justice for decades — bringing working people together, electing progressive leaders, and winning real change across the country.** Together, we’re building this movement the right way — person to person, shoulder to shoulder. Not by courting billionaires or bending to giant corporations. But that’s only possible if a lot of people pitch in a little at a time to build something big. **That’s why I’m hoping you’ll make a donation today to fuel this vital work.[The end-of-year fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and the Working Families Party is still short of their $100K goal. Hitting that target will help ensure they have the resources they need to take on the big fights in 2026 and beyond.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6REQ_CR6XO57pGLKxRzov-QSud9S5fPQCZHGZCJ7YCq0gxjC5vkQYz4f4GIkmWgTAQOJYemBJxxwEnAn7plPrYrlefbUP8LWqhat-5T39lqxIf_KXKy6u8Ij07df-yZYmH9dz_Az_MS9k8-3Dh6wzNe1HHrTS2pGySCJkszqB9NK7WVu4BqTf81glFc-9dmBfFdv3GlgLzDYqSeo2MnSSeMTgVxZxJwjY9-4kgYnVuC8y8AwP1CXNo4JiG_O5cOin6ONxy10kcHg53tkZzYboYRA/4mx/0Fl4kA-pSKem7p6c6GNRhA/h1/h001.TvAK1iW5m4ovxIRVoN0BUJWqaDTN605vFnoW1omyddg)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RELpzn6jo8he0VkzNKMCaUNQKKxEDpRICaAZOfZasV8dgEIn_GCh9kFq6eP1NqbjoLfDOllGimnKgNYIVv0O1f8t7EyCROTRFkV9nNbewk8Gq0HyfLT4KdZzhDslGA5a1VcXyCLqJODcut_COpJy9nxx9avLqF_PjzP9UM9rddnig9kDWE0A4Ug5UTLpawASiX5ENF-dVtarb5eWu_Pj5dHClPe_kEA3ZayXdEZbQjpoj-k9sc4_C6faFEXc-xDPDckJrIVA-lJWqtcdocA15o3/4mx/0Fl4kA-pSKem7p6c6GNRhA/h2/h001.wMp3kD9vaT_SgYe1ca0V6sUzFCzRdzDJxebD3lmJUUk)** Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about electing candidates or enacting policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. To tune them out and fight back, what we need is courage. Courage to stand up to billionaires and corporate donors. Courage to make the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country a little uncomfortable. Courage to shake off any instinct to show how eager we are to compromise and stand by a half-baked plan. **Year after year, I’ve been proud to watch the Working Families Party demonstrate relentless courage and an absolute unwillingness to let fear and cynicism win.** That’s how they’ve been able to help propel candidates to victory up and down the ballot, all around the country — including Zohran Mamdani, whose focus on government serving the people, not billionaires, will make life more affordable for NYC. That’s how they’ve been able to help pass policies like California’s Prop 50, which is creating a more level playing field and ensuring fairer midterm elections. That’s how they’ve been able to help recruit millions of people to show up in record-shattering numbers and say loud and clear that the American people do not bow down to kings. That’s how they’ve been able to prove the critics wrong. **The Working Families Party has big plans to keep up the fight in 2026. But those plans are only possible with the continued support of supporters like you. Let's keep working side by side to make sure the new year is a brighter one for everyone who needs a government that finally is on their side.** **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider contributing $10 or whatever you can today to help the Working Families Party meet their end-of-year fundraising goal before December 31.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6REQ_CR6XO57pGLKxRzov-QSIx6DRWV-ojkE6VUII_7_ijwNhBwUARUjlXExUiR34McO1hgE2L2Y9Xi7lwAL2ebApZwjTcdHoBXsNh0iV0vquqLqpM20BlhiExRzXkiPvgiv18vMq-3Sot_BhRfWEyD3vxVBhJ48no66Vi31pox9RvfaiqWxHo67rFWYT_Qntho52rlBThQYix10392lViSp9U3wMgPa6_KM6btBRpqUXoxHGXUxMr8UUT-X1A6H9W4myJ13hJnbPeozFtNlvwV-/4mx/0Fl4kA-pSKem7p6c6GNRhA/h3/h001.LOnkbtZjm5_3XE7T3CUGavWn_vlcP-a_bfrSiAEXJ_4)** clean_body: | | | Peter — passing along this message from Elizabeth Warren because it speaks to the power we’re building from the ground up. We’re so close to hitting our stretch goal of $130,000 to be raised by midnight tonight, and every single contribution helps us keep organizing, showing up, and building power where it matters most. 2026 is coming fast, with huge elections ahead — and it’s going to take all of us to meet the moment. — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Elizabeth Warren (via Working Families Party) Date: Mon, Dec 29, 2025 Subject: Are you with us? Hello Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. And as I work in the Senate to put political and economic power in the hands of the people — where it belongs — the Working Families Party has been one of my greatest allies. The Working Families Party has been on the front lines of the fight for racial and economic justice for decades — bringing working people together, electing progressive leaders, and winning real change across the country. Together, we’re building this movement the right way — person to person, shoulder to shoulder. Not by courting billionaires or bending to giant corporations. But that’s only possible if a lot of people pitch in a little at a time to build something big. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll make a donation today to fuel this vital work. Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about electing candidates or enacting policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. To tune them out and fight back, what we need is courage. Courage to stand up to billionaires and corporate donors. Courage to make the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country a little uncomfortable. Courage to shake off any instinct to show how eager we are to compromise and stand by a half-baked plan. Year after year, I’ve been proud to watch the Working Families Party demonstrate relentless courage and an absolute unwillingness to let fear and cynicism win. That’s how they’ve been able to help propel candidates to victory up and down the ballot, all around the country — including Zohran Mamdani, whose focus on government serving the people, not billionaires, will make life more affordable for NYC. That’s how they’ve been able to help pass policies like California’s Prop 50, which is creating a more level playing field and ensuring fairer midterm elections. That’s how they’ve been able to help recruit millions of people to show up in record-shattering numbers and say loud and clear that the American people do not bow down to kings. That’s how they’ve been able to prove the critics wrong. The Working Families Party has big plans to keep up the fight in 2026. But those plans are only possible with the continued support of supporters like you. Let's keep working side by side to make sure the new year is a brighter one for everyone who needs a government that finally is on their side. In solidarity, Elizabeth Warren Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

name: Carmela
subject: Fully transparent:
body:
| | | | | | |
Hi, Peter – I know you’re probably about to log off to ring in the New Year, so I’ll keep this quick.

We’re less than a year out from the 2026 elections, and every step we take now matters. Tonight, we face our final fundraising deadline of the year - and I’m asking for your support before the clock strikes midnight.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-fr-2512**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=e6056fba84&e=a7b299e420)

Your donation today directly shapes what we’re able to build in 2026, BY and FOR Team Eastern Washington. Our end of year fundraising determines our budget, the staff we can hire, and the strength of our organizing efforts.

Whether it’s a donation of $5, $10, or $26, your support truly makes a difference.

If you’re able, please chip in right now. We just need to raise $2,039 before midnight to meet our end of year goal, and it would be devastating to fall short when we’re this close.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-fr-2512**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=a9d22b7af5&e=a7b299e420)

Thank you, truly, none of this would be possible without you.

Carmela
