name: David Hogg
subject: Asking one more time, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter,

I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time
when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I
know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing
the results you want to see.

Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve: We are recruiting a
brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s
agenda AND show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we need for
the party’s future.

Think of it this way, Peter — this
is our chance to reset the Democratic Party.

But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots
support.

Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporate special
interests ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the
wings with a $5 million check.

Instead, we’re building this movement $5, $10, and $25 at a time. Some
folks may give more when they’re able — and at the end of the day, it
really adds up.

That’s why I’m writing to you today,
Peter. We need people like you — people who
understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset — to join us in the
fight.

We only have a few hours left until the FEC end-of-year deadline at
midnight. If you’re with us, can you make a $3 donation to
close out 2025 strong?

[ https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251231_2_final.4ALltD&refcode=em20251231-3003&amount=3&t=1001&akid=3003%2E587540%2E6cvcSY ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251231_2_final

Thank you again for all of your support this year. Let’s crush 2026
together.

Happy New Year,
David

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=3003%2E587540%2E6cvcSY
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=3003%2E587540%2E6cvcSY

Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

[PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE]

Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic."_

name: Kate Berry
subject: 3x match ends at midnight!
body:
savetheredwoods.org [savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-3 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-3]
Peter,
Before we pop the champagne and turn the calendar over, the redwoods are on my mind. With the deadline approaching, I wanted to remind you that every gift will be TRIPLED [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-3] tonight to protect and restore redwood forests.
MAKE A MEANINGFUL GIFT TODAY FOR THE REDWOODS. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-3]
Peter, it’s been incredible to watch this community come together for the redwood forests. Thousands of people have already given to the Redwood Resilience Fund, helping us get within reach of our year-end goal, and I’m so grateful for their support!
Let’s finish strong together. Your support tonight can help us hit our goal and ensure redwood forests stand strong for generations to come.
There is no better time than now to become a donor for the redwoods. Your first gift will be tripled before the clock strikes midnight.
Triple your gift by midnight! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-3]
Thank you for being part of this incredible group of supporters committed to the health of communities and the forests.

name: Wiener, Scott
subject: Hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | Peter,

This is my last email before the End of Quarter deadline.

We do not know exactly what we are up against, but we know this race will be competitive and the stakes are enormous.

At least one opponent can self-fund millions.
What we have instead is people.

subject: The clock runs out tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friends, This is it.
In just a few hours, the year comes to a close, and with it, our final opportunity to make a financial impact before the clock hits midnight.
After tonight, the numbers are locked. The strength we show now will determine how well we’re positioned heading into the new year and the fights that are already taking shape.
The other side never misses these moments. They’re counting every dollar, measuring every signal of momentum, and preparing their next moves accordingly. We can’t afford to let them see hesitation—especially now.
If you can make an End-of-Year contribution before midnight, it will go straight to helping us close the year strong and start the next one ready to win.

name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: My first year in Congress
body:
Friend
As we close out the quarter, I just wanted to reach out personally to say thank you. This first year in Congress has been intense, challenging, and deeply meaningful. I don’t take for granted for a moment that I’m able to do this work because of people like you.
Every day, I’m thinking about the families, workers, and communities in CA-30 who are counting on us to show up, listen, and lead with integrity. That responsibility guides every vote I cast and every fight I take on.
As we head into this final FEC deadline of the quarter, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution if you’re able. Your support at moments like this helps ensure we can keep doing this work the right way, grounded in values, accountable to our community, and independent of special interests.
Here’s a good link for that: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122415862/592539217/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDhkN2NkOTEtYjFlNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BH3gQcJggmpq9TdB6FmWA_EqLlAYWn5SBAxTp-6G83M=)**
No matter what, I’m grateful to have you by my side. Thank you for believing in this campaign and in the idea that government can still work for people.
Onward,
Laura

Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/C_LAPt2gvkyS7ttbOCAOdg2?unsubscribedata=%2BPkl3sGn%2FudOxiZzvBjZPXYkZoR3HvYaPUFxhKhHuQgmLNBQL0rMf0iENfV6UbRjniAVtZqgFIpvFmWISWEN2ZRvVWGyNeBnmskNVKW9r4n7okniGKuHASlsJjcfmU0ZE0ZjQ3v%2Bxz63%2FLdoGyx%2FgmO1Lzf%2FS843fgcPVv23FLQo5ZlL5nwhEbD7nLCBo1feJIBD4oDnN9oUh8S9AgO6MoFnycwGlAg2nVjhpsqRSZJdPldn61fcOmsi6AapRMBSquFcwElOdocO53SLRYfMtTZr4fhN4iuDRc3PPccLV1nPqb%2B6zIiZqpOBdOvXrdUMndP6C3mNZLxDvu4r9qnH0%2BjDuQ5ukrT7ZdkCfN80knjSXoCLPlKfDG05yxgvI8jqUAW1a4ndXpH5ArnXV4LhnmBiWh37FAOmTHFuZy%2B5n346e8VDBw5xJbpgz0wJS3%2BB).

name: Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5
subject: Happy New Year, A Bit of What I've Been Up To
body:
Why we fight, Loving the Springs podcast, Speech in Support of Starbucks Workers, Link to ICE Detainee Fundraisers

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a362ed2d505c/happy-new-year-a-bit-of-what-ive-been-up-to?e=738470dca6)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Hi Everyone!

---
| | Running for office has been so meaningful. It’s been an opportunity to get involved in the community in ways I haven’t when my primary focus was transportation and affordable housing. More than that it’s been a platform for deeply important policies.
Until recently, we have let the far right and billionaires create the framework for policy conversations. Instead of making the case for good policy, we negotiate our stances before we even sit at the bargaining table. We take it for granted that big money always wins.
But women’s rights, civil rights, gay rights, and trans rights didn’t just happen.
We won these rights by fighting for them.
It is time that we once again fight for a more perfect union. That we make case for human rights, the Constitution, getting big money out of politics, universal healthcare, affordable housing and good union jobs.
We need to take up space in the political discourse and fight for a better future for our country.
Please support this campaign so that we can bring good policies that help people to the forefront.

D[onate](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=e9a1a490e0&e=738470dca6) by 11:59 tonight, December 31st.
Keep up the momentum of this campaign so that we can look forward to a more just and kind United States of America.
See you at [Caucus and Assembly in March](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=81a3bcc3f8&e=738470dca6) along with the many forums and events I will be attending in the interim.
With heart,Zuri Horowitz
**Check out my**[**speech**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=41897b2d7d&e=738470dca6)**supporting striking Starbucks Workers at a rally organized by the Colorado Springs Area Labor Council.**
**No Contract, No Coffee.**
**Support local workers**[**here**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=ba7d94e425&e=738470dca6)
**Support a local Colorado Springs resident detained by ICE by attending**[**a metal concert**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=29e1e3cd55&e=738470dca6)
---
| | **Listen to my**[**podcast**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=678bac3b60&e=738470dca6)**episode with Loving the Springs!****We talk about the importance of putting people first when it comes to all areas of policy.**
---
[|
---](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=c64421a584&e=738470dca6)
| | **Updates:**[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=67026091d7&e=738470dca6)**-** We made our first [ad](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=d228f91a1a&e=738470dca6) with an Emmy winning editor. Now we need enough money to hire staff, and expand our outreach via door knocking, texts, postcards, and mailers.
[**Volunteer**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=380d9b2241&e=738470dca6)**-** Our outreach strategy will rely on volunteers & minimize paper waste. If you haven’t signed up already, please do!
**Social Media \- **We have the biggest community on [**TikTok**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=8b179ffc21&e=738470dca6)**** out of all of the candidates (we made it to 1600+ people), second biggest community on [**Instagram**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=a1752c9501&e=738470dca6) , and we’ve got a ways to go on [**Facebook**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=c6964c3efd&e=738470dca6).
Your _follows_ , _likes_ , and _shares_ help a lot to let people know about our campaign!
---
| [Subscribe to my email list](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=76bdcff3c2&e=738470dca6)

clean_body: Why we fight, Loving the Springs podcast, Speech in Support of Starbucks Workers, Link to ICE Detainee Fundraisers | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi Everyone! | | Running for office has been so meaningful. It’s been an opportunity to get involved in the community in ways I haven’t when my primary focus was transportation and affordable housing. More than that it’s been a platform for deeply important policies. Until recently, we have let the far right and billionaires create the framework for policy conversations. Instead of making the case for good policy, we negotiate our stances before we even sit at the bargaining table. We take it for granted that big money always wins. But women’s rights, civil rights, gay rights, and trans rights didn’t just happen. We won these rights by fighting for them. It is time that we once again fight for a more perfect union. That we make case for human rights, the Constitution, getting big money out of politics, universal healthcare, affordable housing and good union jobs. We need to take up space in the political discourse and fight for a better future for our country. Please support this campaign so that we can bring good policies that help people to the forefront. D by 11:59 tonight, December 31st. Keep up the momentum of this campaign so that we can look forward to a more just and kind United States of America. See you at along with the many forums and events I will be attending in the interim. With heart,Zuri Horowitz Check out my striking Starbucks Workers at a rally organized by the Colorado Springs Area Labor Council. No Contract, No Coffee. Support local workers Support a local Colorado Springs resident detained by ICE by attending | | Listen to my with Loving the Springs!We talk about the importance of putting people first when it comes to all areas of policy. | | Updates:- We made our first with an Emmy winning editor. Now we need enough money to hire staff, and expand our outreach via door knocking, texts, postcards, and mailers. - Our outreach strategy will rely on volunteers & minimize paper waste. If you haven’t signed up already, please do! Social Media \- We have the biggest community on **** out of all of the candidates (we made it to 1600+ people), second biggest community on , and we’ve got a ways to go on . Your follows , likes , and shares help a lot to let people know about our campaign! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5. All rights reserved.

Peter, you are a major part of this campaign.

I’m running for Congress because people like you deserve a government that works _for_ you – not just the wealthy and well-connected. Together, we can fight corruption, unrig the economy, and build a future our kids can count on.

**But I need to be honest:** We’re just hours from our FEC deadline, and we’re still $17,254 short of this major stress test of the campaign. When the clock strikes midnight tonight, how much we’ve raised this quarter will go public – and your support will send a powerful message about the strength of our movement.
I know you want to prove that this race is winnable – and that people, not corporate PACs, will decide the future of Texas. **[That’s why your donation of $5 or more today matters so much. You can help hit our $100,000 end-of-quarter goal and show the GOP that this movement is real, powerful, and impossible to ignore. body:
I will make this quick.
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251231-2.rRgOId&refcode=em20251231-2633&t=1&akid=2633%2E21716%2EmI-9EU)
I don’t want to interrupt your New Year’s Eve celebrations, so I will make this quick:
**As my first year in Congress quickly comes to an end, I want to say thank you.** It’s been the honor of my life to represent the great state of Delaware in the People’s House, and I wouldn’t have been able to keep up the fight for working families, our democracy, and our rights without your generosity and grassroots support.
As you know, we’re heading into a critical midterm election year, so I’m hoping I can count on you once more this year.
**Our team set a goal to bring in 50,000 donations before midnight to keep my voice in Congress and help Democrats reclaim the House. As of 5:55 pm ET, we’re roughly 7,000 donations short.**
The good news is that if just half of everyone reading this pitched in ANY amount, we’d reach our goal.
[**So if you’re in the position to give, please chip in $1, $5, $10, or even $50 to help us reach our big end-of-year goal before we report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission after midnight.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251231-2.rRgOId&refcode=em20251231-2633&t=2&akid=2633%2E21716%2EmI-9EU)

clean_body: I will make this quick. I don’t want to interrupt your New Year’s Eve celebrations, so I will make this quick: As my first year in Congress quickly comes to an end, I want to say thank you. It’s been the honor of my life to represent the great state of Delaware in the People’s House, and I wouldn’t have been able to keep up the fight for working families, our democracy, and our rights without your generosity and grassroots support. As you know, we’re heading into a critical midterm election year, so I’m hoping I can count on you once more this year. Our team set a goal to bring in 50,000 donations before midnight to keep my voice in Congress and help Democrats reclaim the House. As of 5:55 pm ET, we’re roughly 7,000 donations short. The good news is that if just half of everyone reading this pitched in ANY amount, we’d reach our goal. Thank you so much for having my back, — Sarah

name: Katie Porter
subject: A no-BS ask before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
After midnight, our team will be figuring out if we have the resources to win this primary election.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40646%2E3422442%2EXlom35)
Peter,
I have a no-BS ask to make: **[can you chip in to my campaign right now to help us reach our $75,000 goal before the year ends?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251231_4_ak.KHb9Ui&refcode=em20251231-40646&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40646%2E3422442%2EXlom35)**
I know that might seem abrupt, but I wouldn’t be emailing you right now if it wasn’t urgent.
Let me explain.
At midnight, we close the books on our 2025 fundraising. While many people will be celebrating the new year, our team will be figuring out if we have the resources to win this primary election.
Under California law, our 2025 fundraising numbers will become public. That means every donation we get before midnight will help us show strength, while every missed opportunity creates an opening for our opponents to attack.
We set this $75,000 goal because that’s how much more we need to raise from email to be in a good position heading into 2026. Hitting it means we can start the new year ready to compete, but falling short means we’ll be catching up from day one.
**[That’s why I’m emailing you tonight to give you one more opportunity to chip in to our campaign. No matter how much or how little you donate, it will go a long way to helping us win. So, can you give $5 before midnight?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251231_4_ak.KHb9Ui&refcode=em20251231-40646&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40646%2E3422442%2EXlom35)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251231_4_ak.KHb9Ui&refcode=em20251231-40646&t=23&akid=40646%2E3422442%2EXlom35)
Thank you, Peter, I hope you have a safe and fun New Year’s Eve!
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251231-40646&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40646_3422442_Xlom35&akid=40646%2E3422442%2EXlom35)**

name: Benson HQ
subject: Before the ball drops
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It’s nearly time to say goodbye to 2025, but can we ask for something from you before it’s over?
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1228%2E181023%2Eh1oSVR)
Do you know how campaign staff spend New Year’s Eve,?
Watching campaign donations come in, waiting to see if we meet our end-of-the-year fundraising goal. It’s exciting to see the outpouring of support, especially for a candidate as fantastic as Jocelyn.
**[So before we ring in the new year, what do you say, friend? Can you give us something extra to celebrate? A $20.25 donation to say goodbye to this year could make our evening!](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2205?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hRcPIU&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251231_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1228%2E181023%2Eh1oSVR)**
[DONATE $20.25](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2205?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hRcPIU&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251231_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1228%2E181023%2Eh1oSVR)
---
It would also help Jocelyn start the new year off on a solid footing, because that’s what matters in a race as competitive as this one.
Thanks, and have a happy New Year!
— Team Benson

clean_body: | | | Adding in Friend to ensure they received the message. Friend—here’s the bottom line: we are hours away from 2026, and the momentum we carry into the new year will depend on what we’re able to accomplish HERE AND NOW! | | | | We’re counting on every bit of support. More details below. Thank you in advance, Caroline Team Hurd \--------Begin Forwarded Message-------- From: Jeff Hurd (Personal) Date: Tues, Dec. 30, 2025 10:02AM | | | | 1 Day & 14 Hours (approx.) to go...until our End-of-Year Fundraising Deadline Friend: As the year winds down, our team is making one final push to finish strong. We’re close to reaching our benchmark ($1,140 left) , and every contribution in these final hours strengthens our footing heading into next year. The work we’ve done this year is something I am deeply proud of, and one achievement in particular stands out: Delivering the LARGEST TAX CUT ____for working families in history. To break it down simply, that provided: ✅ Bigger Paychecks: $11,900 increase in take-home pay for a family of four.✅No Tax on Overtime: 80 million hourly workers will keep an extra $1,400 a year. ✅ No Tax on Tips: Up to $25,000 in tips per year is completely tax-free.✅Relief for Seniors: 88% will no longer pay federal taxes on their Social Security. ✅Enhanced Child Tax Credit: $2,500 per child, fully refundable.✅ Stronger Small Businesses: The largest middle-class & small business tax cuts ever. ✅$50 Billion for Rural Hospitals: Protecting access to care across America. | | | | As we approach the year’s final deadline, I’m grateful for everything we have accomplished together. Your support has fueled this effort every step of the way, and it’s clear that when we stay focused and determined, we can deliver real results. | | Thank you for being part of this mission and for believing in the work we’re doing together. Sincerely, | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2026 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to mail this to your house…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
clean_body: I tried to mail this to your house, Peter - but I never heard back from you. It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm sending this message directly to your inbox because you are one of our top Patriots in your state. I know this is longer than our usual messages, but please take a moment to read it from start to finish - and please don't forget to Thank you for everything you do. \- Steve Scalise ORIGINAL MESSAGEPATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I offered to conduct this project as part of our Republican Party's mission to ensure that every single patriotic American citizen is registered to vote and fully empowered to guide our nation's future. Your record stands out as a proud American, law-abiding taxpayer, and a registered voter living in: your state. Please ensure our records are as accurate as possible by completing the VERIFICATION SURVEY below. You are identified as a loyal patriot, so I am really counting on your prompt response. This project's results will be incomplete if we don't hear from you. And frankly, with everything at stake, your voice is urgently needed in our country's system of self-government. As House Majority Leader, I am proud of everything I am doing to help President Trump enact his America First agenda. And I will not stop. Not ever. But the Democrats are spreading lies about the policies and getting their base of supporters riled up. We've already seen left-wing "resistance" activists in communities across the country (including near your part of your state). And we are seeing Democrat Party committees and liberal PACs smashing fundraising records. All due to anti-Trump hatred. If loyal patriots can't organize and mobilize on our own, the Woke Democrats will take back power and shut down our MAGA agenda. And they will spend President Trump's final two years in office attacking him with more Witch Hunts and impeachment drives. That is why your immediate response is so important, Peter. I was honored to be selected by my colleagues to serve as Majority Leader. But I do not lead "from the top down." I listen to the grassroots . . . to patriotic men and women like you who love our country, share my conservative values, and want the best for our kids and grandkids. And I am confident that the best way to strengthen our movement - and score big victories at the polls in 2026 - is by continuing to work shoulder to shoulder with you and other caring citizens. To defeat the Woke Left and pass the rest of President Trump's MAGA agenda, we'll need REAL Americans to vote in large numbers. And we'll need them to cast informed votes. That means pushing back against left-wing propaganda at every turn through next November. So please complete your VERIFICATION SURVEY and submit it TODAY. And when you respond, I urge you to include one important gift of $250, $100, $50, $35, or any amount you can spare to my campaign. As I push the Trump Agenda through the House, forcing tough, narrow votes and speaking up for facts and the truth, I am coming under relentless attack from the left-wing campaign machine. So please complete our voter verification survey as soon as possible. And don't forget to include your important gift of $250, $100, $50, or $35. Every dollar will fuel my fight to pass more pro-America policies and mobilize a surge of MAGA voters to the polls next year. Thank you and God bless! Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Leader Q1. Are you a registered voter in your state?. Do you intend to vote in the 2026 midterm elections?. Did you vote in person in the 2024 presidential election?. Do you want your state's law enforcement officials to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), when it comes to detaining illegal aliens? - HOW IMPORTANT IS IT THAT YOUR PUBLIC OFFICIALS WORK TO: 1\. Secure the border.\. Protect parents' rights.\. Cut the debt.\. Stop socialism. have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America. The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on itIn just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team. This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. Those who are ready to help President Trump and Republicans ring in the Golden Age of America.| | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

Thank you for supporting us in 2025! Stay tuned for some exciting announcements in 2026 👀 Happy New Year's Eve!
—Austin Davis

name: Roy Cooper
subject: My final ask of 2025
body:
I’ll keep this brief.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
Hey Peter, I know you may be starting to gather for New Year’s celebrations, so I’ll be brief. Our final end-of-quarter deadline of 2025 before we publicly file is only hours away. We set a $1 million online fundraising goal to stay competitive with our GOP opponent and his donors who are lined up to support him. They have PACs lined up to spend hundreds of millions against us — and President Trump’s actions targeting our race are sure to bring even more attention from Republican mega-donors. I’ve asked you for so much already this year. I wouldn’t ask again now if it weren’t essential. I need you to invest whatever is right for you — $5, $50, or even more — in our campaign. We have to hit this goal before midnight tonight to avoid giving up the momentum in this toss up race. Here is a link where you can donate (please do so before midnight tonight): **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_fr_eoy?LASTCHANCE_dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3622?t=7&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)** Thank you, and Happy New Year. — Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3622?t=8&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=238%2E124072%2E7oFdSG)

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Something big just happened in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
Peter, it’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $15 or more between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99047?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $15 between Chris’s campaign and State Democrats Committee today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99047?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99048?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99047?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv)
---
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99047?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv)**
With gratitude,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99047?refcode=em20251231-9895&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9895%2E614464%2EpQaNRv)

Peter,
Celebrate the new year starting in less than 6 hours by making sure you don’t leave any money on the table in 2025! Oregon’s Political Tax Credit allows eligible tax-paying Oregonians to give $50 (individual) or $100 (couple filing jointly) to the OLCV PAC and get it back when they file their taxes. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2] It’s essentially a free gift that will turn into lasting climate action.
You’re eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
✔ You are an Oregon resident

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: How Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life
body:
A message Charlie lived — not just preached
Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book.
| | [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=319b4b8ccdf748f49c1f0b85b8c5ea83&_e=DlhDVitwXDeA5nPbst7Znf4lhVcJg6gWxJpKH_BxzRgri8dJ5yFHbcgdsWAahgZ-p8ADQrDfNFWgMVS6LX5gtpGXJZ7DzDXfqgb4pZ3_RT7Dx0xXnialInO6w4040f1znWRo6G4vrvtcLs0YC9aWWgRn077U-DvEQcIdwshhRRJfZWqd4p6hhh5j-KzLgk7HqDHqblKoH7zjRVzmHUNOr4idWabSZgaH1KWxex2SzLU5XPd65B9I24L41qmggJsdzS1caqH4BfiNamI4okWivqUyFkGJnVI4kI3gm3cBXU6pUohiEIu6bZ4TCs-5XXanf8jMknDnv1n1vusRpl9LGiQZcWBQA6r1TQEDrM82eZ_DJtj3od84EJzAwxTs-1b7PNPboGQTsFgBLwagExrN3tLvTa-XzA0XcEtqywrCZaFta3kVzV8228SEah5HTe5JL-Ls4dVanBdKAp9a1cRg0oylNCSbEYDN5sS-oM0TpRyPefU97k-0QbYHNCjtYH6OH7hxuQZBSTsXVsZrWuJ3uooNyGOc-2Wjlcp98onWQ1j55gApP3-Nzuamu0WDmc5K4YZXEiA48dThJYPlLBV_-MlotGeO03qiOCIVDjm6x1E_790SDPc_FT_m9hkZ4IM-KDTLv6NQFgaeCbL6Bx7yq8OPAekgmttEUUEgXvhwItMIVP2MQSLf_5QuGTG08fBQ)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

| Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=319b4b8ccdf748f49c1f0b85b8c5ea83&_e=DlhDVitwXDeA5nPbst7Znf4lhVcJg6gWxJpKH_BxzRgri8dJ5yFHbcgdsWAahgZ-p8ADQrDfNFWgMVS6LX5gtpGXJZ7DzDXfqgb4pZ3_RT7Dx0xXnialInO6w4040f1znWRo6G4vrvtcLs0YC9aWWgRn077U-DvEQcIdwshhRRJfZWqd4p6hhh5j-KzLgk7HqDHqblKoH7zjRVzmHUNOr4idWabSZgaH1KWxex2SzLVX1ekdW-PDWBuMDyYeyza_PC4nXVwMOVlh2ZYVJsrmp2MsSdUgFORqY0BGiRM6dvzu9SyVBqtKnEYNrGMQGeX1SKUjsM_MXnVkYMgF3LZF0sYDNk0BPNlxbCE9bUY9_KUcpHAUipQpzvpNncY-ezwtiPaAlYOR2ec1LCgvnpeVFr8QW3WfMlmE2fz0arrPiqyY2YxZt_kuA-1KOEMH4WY6kpEorDdpDxlTvLiZUwigjkWdIn2aJcVCnwcKRvHx9TA9YVNLMnLlBpltooRzlwjBoQKXrXag0kv3wobP6LIyFK6m2xUMJLq8QS8DZMffLqdETW7h2asOLLIWIRrOkwEKwtGLDtKY8O1EJwVmVce_Y8PYnYgnhYj9Gn3BH3DuoTljHXX1qpKUVB4AoxUf30_bzqUN8uldOJ-23Erj83wmuprR8qwbbPLRLRhfgX68qUJ6njThhW-2Nkf3Z5tbgiZx)**

| Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
| **For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: A message Charlie lived — not just preached Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book. | | | Fellow Patriot, | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. | | Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. | | Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: | | | | | I’m up against a hard deadline AT MIDNIGHT TONIGHT , so I’ll come right out and say it: Seriously, just $1. With just one minute of your time, I can explain a little more: Freedom Caucus Chairman Andy Harris here. >>> The Radical Left Democrats are SCHEMING to REDRAW my home district and WIPE OUT my critical House seat . . . >>> The Establishment RINOs are CHOMPING AT THE BIT to run me out of Washington because I dared fight for the America First agenda YOU voted for . . . >>> And the Lobbyist Machine is raising MILLIONS against me and the House Freedom Caucus because we refuse to sell out the American people! $1 to take on the Radical Left Democrats and Establishment RINOs trying to run me out of Washington. $1 to show them that the SILENT MAJORITY will NEVER SURRENDER to the Swamp. $1 not because it’ll fund the whole campaign... The fact is, I don’t have a rolodex of millionaire donors to call. Nor do I want to. Grassroots patriots like YOU power my campaign, $1, $5, $15 at a time because YOU are who I work for! But like I said, I’m up against a hard deadline AT MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. The clock is ticking – and our ENTIRE America First agenda is on the line if we fall short. Thousands of patriots have already stepped up. For America,Rep. Andy HarrisFreedom Caucus Chairman | | Paid for by Andy Harris for Congress | | PO Box 6, Cambridge, MD 21613

name: Binkley for Congress
subject: Final Hours: This Is It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
Our End-of-Year deadline closes tonight.

| | | | | [|
---](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=1e8bce43f1&e=a4fe331f26)

Friend ,

This is it.In just a few hours, the **End-of-Year deadline closes** , and with it, our chance to finish the year at full strength.We’ve pushed hard, built momentum, and made real progress. But whether we enter the new year in a position of strength comes down to what happens **right now**.I don’t want to wake up tomorrow knowing we fell short because we waited.If you can give, please do it now. Even a modest contribution in these final hours helps us cross the finish line and start the next phase ready to win.The clock is ticking, and I’m grateful for your support.

subject: Before you head out tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Emily Randall for Congress
Peter, I’ll be quick.
We’re $647 away from hitting our end-of-year goal.
If you can make a small donation before midnight, it will help us head into 2026 ready to organize, fight for our neighbors, and elect leaders who put PEOPLE first – not greed or ego.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Last chance: Can you chip in to the DNC before our last deadline of the year?
body:
---
$7. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to the DNC before our last end-of-quarter deadline of the year. $7 because a strong fundraising report will send a powerful message to Trump and his allies: that we won’t stand idly by while they work to rig elections in their favor and dismantle our democracy. $7 because the more contributions we receive now, before 2026 even begins, the higher our likelihood is of repeating the massive victories we saw across the country last month. $7 because the only way Democrats will win back Congress and ultimately, the White House, is if everyone steps up and does their part to help. $7 may not seem like it can do all of that, but when we combine your $7 contribution with contributions from thousands of other grassroots supporters just like you, it goes a very long way. [**So, will you pitch in $7 right now to help us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251231_5605_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5605_22930333_1kmvA8&akid=5605%2E22930333%2E1kmvA8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251231_5605_fr&refcode2=5605_22930333_1kmvA8&akid=5605%2E22930333%2E1kmvA8)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I don’t mean to be a bother, but I have a small favor to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,
You've been with us through thick and thin, and we're truly grateful for the unyielding support you've given to our fight.
But as we prepare to close out the year, I have just one more important favor to ask...

It'll only take a minute of your time, but it would mean the world to me and the entire team here at House GOP. you for your time, Peter. -| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Derek Tran
subject: final ask
body:
Hi friend,

Thanks for opening this message. I know it’s New Year’s Eve and your inbox is probably full, so I’ll keep this quick and honest.

Tonight is our final FEC deadline of the year. What we raise before midnight will go on the public record for every reporter, GOP strategist, and national super PAC to see.

If you’ve been waiting to donate, now is the time: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dt-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122420341/592548017/-1516755731?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGFhODkzMzMtYmVlNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nsfOjJ_O5dG1F0rc83alpG35pGFo6_rRyWiU4bWHuBU=)**

We flipped this seat by just 653 votes in 2024. Now, we’re now one of the most vulnerable House seats in the country -- and Republicans know it. They’ve lined up four GOP challengers, and we’re hearing credible reports that a high-profile Republican could jump in at any moment. This time, the GOP’s coming in with more money, more outside backing, and more candidates than ever before. If we show weakness tonight, they’ll double down.

We already know what kind of campaign they’ll run. But I’m not trying to match them dollar-for-dollar -- I’m building something different. That’s exactly why I’ve sworn off special interest money from Big Pharma or Big Oil. I believe campaigns should answer to people, not special interests, and that means I rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep us in this fight.

Every dollar before midnight helps show we’re ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. Any amount -- even one dollar -- truly helps: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dt-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122420342/592548018/-1516755731?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGFhODkzMzMtYmVlNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nsfOjJ_O5dG1F0rc83alpG35pGFo6_rRyWiU4bWHuBU=)**

Thank you,

Derek
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122420343/592548019/-1516755731?refcode=em-12.31.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGFhODkzMzMtYmVlNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nsfOjJ_O5dG1F0rc83alpG35pGFo6_rRyWiU4bWHuBU=)**

10441 Stanford Avenue

Garden Grove, CA 92842

clean_body: | | | This is it, folks — the final hours of 2025! 🪩🥂🥳 As the year comes to a close, I wanted to reach out to you one last time before you head out for NYE plans. As a dad to two boys, I may or may not be in bed by 9:30pm if I’m lucky. Happy New Year! Here’s to new beginnings, big milestones, and a campaign that’s just getting warmed up. 🔥 — Joe Reagan | | \---------- Forwarded message --------- | | | | Friends, this race won’t be decided by Washington. Earlier this month, more than 100 supporters packed Joe's downtown campaign office for a standing-room-only grand opening. That energy wasn’t manufactured in D.C. — it came from neighbors showing up for a campaign they believe in. That kind of energy doesn’t come from Washington. It comes from right here in Colorado Springs. And tonight, as we count down the final hours of the year, we’re ringing in the new year with a big toast to our supporters for getting us this far. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | | | Thanks again. We hope you all stay safe tonight and enjoy the New Year! 🥂🪩 — Team Reagan | | | Joe Reagan is a Democrat, decorated combat Veteran, nonprofit leader, and devoted father running for Congress to flip Colorado’s 5th District blue. With over 20+ years of experience leading change and teams across the defense, technology, and nonprofit sectors, Joe Reagan is ready to step up and bring the concerns of our community to Congress. Support Joe’s campaign to help launch a new era of leadership in Washington D.C. »** | | FOLLOW JOE ONLINE: | | ---|--- Paid for by the Committee to Elect Joe Reagan

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Our LAST fundraising deadline in 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Hi, it’s Mandela Barnes.

My Republican opponent is already trying to spin the truth about who I am. If you want to help me fight back, you can use this link to chip in. https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6600?t=1002&akid=5754%2E196590%2EZLu8yQ

My opponent called me a “dangerous far-left extremist.” But let me ask you, are these things extreme?

Is it extreme to advocate for every Wisconsinite to have access to affordable healthcare? I don’t think so.

Is it extreme to dream of a Wisconsin where working families who play by the rules can make ends meet, and even afford to go on vacation once in a while? I wouldn’t say it is.

And is it so extreme to close the same loopholes for billionaires that are bleeding our middle class dry? Absolutely not.

It is very telling that Republicans think these goals are dangerous.

But I’m running for governor to ensure that nobody in Wisconsin goes without food, shelter, or healthcare. Because the Wisconsin Way is to bring each other up, not pull them down. It is to actually deliver outcomes, not create chaos and division.

If these sound like principles you can get behind, please chip in $27 or whatever you can to support my campaign.

DONATE $27 »
https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6600?t=1003&akid=5754%2E196590%2EZLu8yQ

Thank you,
Mandela Barnes

[ https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6525?source_code=&t=1001&akid=5754%2E196590%2EZLu8yQ ]CONTRIBUTE NOW »

Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 90541
Milwaukee, WI 53209

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5754%2E196590%2EZLu8yQ

# [Happy New Year -- The Mamdani Way Is Not Frank Sinatra's Way](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183115480&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMTE1NDgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjcyNDQyMjksImV4cCI6MTc2OTgzNjIyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xnbyfLOofnlmtGJAN33rqYB4Cal3mK6jJT-tL7EnOs8)

| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183115480&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMTE1NDgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjcyNDQyMjksImV4cCI6MTc2OTgzNjIyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xnbyfLOofnlmtGJAN33rqYB4Cal3mK6jJT-tL7EnOs8)
Just after midnight, while much of the world rang in the New Year (where celebrations weren't canceled for security concerns), New York City ushered in a new political era.
**Zohran Mamdani** was sworn in as mayor -- the city's first Muslim, openly pro-Palestinian mayor who has tolerated or excused rhetoric such as "Globalize the Intifada" and has built his rise on an aggressively anti-Israel political posture.
Many used their platforms to warn about Mamdani. It wasn't enough. One of my favorites is Sid Rosenberg and he is relentless. You all agreed and laughed but not enough acted at the ballot box.
To those who did fight -- keep fighting. Outgoing Mayor **Eric Adams** , while far from perfect, did at least encourage New Yorkers to be vocal and engaged rather than silent spectators to their city's decline. With respect to anti-semitism, he created the Mayor's Office to Combat Antisemitism and appointed Moshe Davis (another fighter) as its Executive Director to make an impact.
During his transition, Mamdani met with leaders from the Jewish community and others. He even visited the Ohel to pray and hear concerns. Yet symbolism does not outweigh policy -- and many of my Jewish friends remain deeply fearful about what comes next.
Perhaps most alarming has been the advocacy of more than 3,500 New York City public defenders and legal services attorneys, primarily represented by the Association of Legal Aid Attorneys (ALAA-UAW Local 2325), who have demanded the removal of NYPD Commissioner **Jessica Tisch**. Their claim: that stops of Black and Brown New Yorkers have "surged," and that policing of pro-Palestinian demonstrations and other "movements for justice" has intensified.
Frank Sinatra would roll over in his grave.
* * *
### **Sinatra 's New York vs. Mamdani's New York**
New Year's Eve in New York evokes _New York, New York_ and _My Way_. But the Mamdani Way is the opposite of Sinatra's.
Sinatra's New York didn't hand out guarantees -- it handed out chances. It rewarded those willing to seize opportunity, to fail, to try again, and to earn respect through performance. You showed up. You delivered. If you made it, the city respected you.
Mamdani rewards complacency.
He promises rent freezes, free transit, and "affordable" housing -- not through increased supply or innovation, but through a crushing sea of regulation. In Sinatra's New York, you showed up on time -- not late to a Zoom call in pajamas with unlimited personal days -- and you earned your place. No one needed to understand your lifestyle. You either performed, or you were gone.
Sinatra's city was loud, imperfect, sometimes cruel -- but to the victor went the spoils. And if you made it there, you could make it anywhere.
Mamdani's New York is built on empty promises layered with social-media slogans. Transit will be "free," which means inefficient and unsafe, with social workers replacing enforcement. Expect endless press releases, task forces, and visions that bankrupt the city as the Sinatra New Yorkers -- the tax base -- flee to make it anywhere else.
Don't expect a bailout from **Kathy Hochul**. Instead, pray for a **Bruce Blakeman** victory for governor this November.
* * *
### **From Skyscrapers to Safety Nets**
Sinatra's New York made you rise to the heights of its skyscrapers.
Mamdani's New York embraces the nine most terrifying words in the English language, as warned by **Ronald Reagan** :
> _" I'm from the government, and I'm here to help."_
Only now, the message is worse: _New York will lower itself to you._
If you succeed, you don't deserve it. If you build something, it should be taken, canceled, or nationalized.
The Mamdani regime promises to tax the wealthy and successful, regulate everything in sight, and re-educate the city with a DEI soup that promotes diversity without merit. The result will be a fractured backbone and shattered infrastructure -- masked by "vibes," redistribution, and the illusion that tax dollars will flow forever, no matter how aggressively the city punishes those who generate them.
When Mamdani pushes too far, the tough will leave. Capital will flee. Builders will stop building. Crime will rise. The city will become even more unaffordable -- and a new scapegoat will be blamed. The biggest losers won't be the "ultra-wealthy," but the middle class still clinging to the belief that this city works, or that they're not liquid or flexible enough to escape.
* * *
### **A Warning, Not Just for New York**
Sinatra's New York dared you to be great.
Mamdani's city dares you to stay comfortable -- until there's nothing left worth staying for. And when the next parasitic exodus begins, don't worry: the same failed Democrat-Socialist policies will be exported to the next host city. Sanctuary city mandates. Leaf-blower bans (so you can Zoom from home). Public-benefits charges to pay your neighbor's electric bill.
* **If Mamdaniland can happen in New York, it can happen anywhere.**
* **It 's up to you to stop it this November at the ballot box.
Wake up, middle-class voters.**
* **May New York serve as the warning -- the iceberg ahead -- so your city, county, and state don't become the next Titanic. **
* Get Engaged - and if you do not know how, reach out and spread the message.
_**Happy New Year - Share this and grow this awareness - more need to be woken up -**_

name: Tactical
subject: Here's your New Years gift package (2 gifts inside)
body:
Open up and see your gifts. Arrives in 2-3 days after confirmation.
| | | |
---
---
|
---
#
---
Happy New Years! 2026 is a chance to get serious about your health — not just for yourself, but so you can be there for the people who count on you. If one of your goals for 2026 is to feel stronger, healthier, and more in control of your body... We want to help you start immediately. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrsnddesi2u15t2n9fo6db8rj695ttkjb4uigkd8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmmplu8qs5gopv628lddvlj6p50ibrj0n2lkcmho_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq0duvjsdqjvo22hno3u00quslqej4nb9mbncquo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv4of71cbt8mgveaanviac4am9rrfres0tutfkvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ord3r86rvbgp80rnjh17vifdho5d4pmlt8kifg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ge6tib772453oqkvl1t4mfp8a0sceeo64uas6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zherbc1d88aq9g18pdvet48gf225ook4affblcc0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhd57pss4tba3a5s4egq60m70j0hagsmifr7u7r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1uth0o9ab9dffb141tcp7qkrebsjp26bob1ilo0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hmaoj6cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The investigations that made them sweat in 2025
body:
I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught.

Dear Friend,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgr6g6qrip95de297cp22h0i514gol5bqeibodto_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hm6p32cjh2bs) Yesterday I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught. A bureaucrat who assumed no one was watching. An institution that believed it was above accountability. **They were wrong. And we have the footage to prove it.** Here are five investigations from 2025 that changed the game:
* **1\. THE $100 BILLION FEDERAL CONTRACTING SCAM (October)**
* We exposed ATI Government Solutions exploiting the SBA's 8(a) minority contracting program -- outsourcing 80% of their work while pocketing over $100 million in no-bid contracts. This wasn't a one-off. It was a systemic scheme across multiple agencies.
* **THE RESULT:** SBA suspension. $253 million in contracts halted. A $9 billion Treasury Department audit. Seven additional companies suspended. And a 15-year review of 8(a) contracts across every federal agency.
* **2\. GAO DATA THEFT CONFESSION (November)**
* A GAO director admitted on hidden camera that staff "stole and backed up" vaccine data specifically to block RFK Jr.'s HHS reforms. They weren't just resisting policy -- they were breaking federal law.
* **THE RESULT:** The director's profile was scrubbed. A federal investigation was launched. And the nation finally saw what "deep state resistance" actually looks like.
* **3\. NIH PORTRAIT DESTRUCTION (December)**
* NIH contractor Joseph Olmert confessed on camera to destroying official portraits of President Trump, Vice President Vance, RFK Jr., and Dr. Jay Bhattacharya. That's a potential 10-year federal felony -- destruction of government property.
* **THE RESULT:** Contractor FIRED. NIH internal investigation launched. And a national conversation about the defiance embedded in our federal agencies.
* **4\. GEORGETOWN PROFESSOR EXPOSED (December)**
* We caught a Georgetown professor on hidden camera calling Black conservatives "coons" and mocking "stupid white people." When we confronted him, he tried to assault our cameraman. Police were called.
* **THE RESULT:** Georgetown wiped his bio from their website. The footage went viral -- over 2 million views. And elite academic bias was laid bare for all to see.
* **5\. INSIDE EPSTEIN 'S ISLAND (May-December)**
* We released the first-ever footage from inside Jeffrey Epstein's private island mansion. We confronted a DOJ Deputy Chief who admitted plans to redact Republicans from the Epstein files. We published unredacted photos that Democrats tried to hide.
* **THE RESULT:** DOJ was forced to respond. Media outlets issued corrections. Joe Rogan covered our findings. And the truth about elite corruption reached millions who had been kept in the dark.

_This is what your support produces._ Not theories. Not speculation. **Results.** We're now at **$81,000 raised** -- just **$19,000 away** from hitting our $100,000 goal. [**Every dollar you give is still matched.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1pirelc3qm63j93fkfadfvfdm7mti4n1ajrq6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hm6p32cjh2bs) And [**every donor**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49qr5j5qlf3ijejvnfddr6hfvfroeba8785js98_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hm6p32cjh2bs) receives our exclusive 2025 Year-End Review. **SPECIAL DONOR THANK-YOU GIFTS:**
* **$100+:** Hardcover copy of _American Pravda_
* **$250+:** Personally SIGNED hardcover
* **$500+:** Personal phone call from me

**Midnight is right around the corner. $19,000 to go.**[**Let 's finish this together.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggnk9mn3mmfa6bpbfdm65m27rbgm1gt7ib558b0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hm6p32cjh2bs) For the truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group
**P.S.** These investigations don't happen by accident. They happen because you fund them. **[**Give now and double your impact before the match expires**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z172uub2lelqv85k25j2rukfd473g2fvnt2o94jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7c9hm6p32cjh2bs).**

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
