Happy New Year!
I wanted to reach out because I know my campaign emailed you a lot heading into the new year, but I owe you an honest update as we kick off 2026.
Our team crunched the numbers after our fundraising deadline, and unfortunately we came **_just short of our goal._**
This race was never going to be easy, and the truth is: Defending this open seat hinges on grassroots supporters stepping up, staying engaged, and helping us build the momentum to win.
Every dollar, every door knocked, and every piece of literature count and help us reach voters across New Hampshire.
As we kick off the year, we are laser-focused on closing this gap. **[So if you’re able to chip in and help us catch up, it would mean the world.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260101_1.ynm2sY&refcode=em20260101-1&t=2&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260101_1.GR0W4h&amount=5&refcode=em20260101-1&t=3&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)**
Thank you for being on this team,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260101-1&t=4&refcode2=4339_582294_0_l4Xm&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=5&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=6&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4339%2E582294%2E0_l4Xm)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
Newark Liberty International Airport, a sprawling American monument to holiday travel chaos, overpriced pretzels, and security lines designed by sadists, has now added a new feature: incubator for measles. Officials warn that on **December 12 and 19** , [a single infected passenger turned Terminals B and C into a Petri dish of epidemic potential](https://substack.com/redirect/f1090c1b-a10e-42eb-a451-c0fa3ce655ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you were there, officials are urging that you monitor symptoms and double check your vaccination status. Translation: if you were not vaccinated, enjoy the rash, fever, and possibly worse because nature is coming to collect its due.
How did we get here? How did the United States, a nation that once eliminated measles, smallpox, and polio, allow people to wander through life and transportation hubs unvaccinated, clueless, and ripe for infection?
The answer lies in [a toxic stew of right-wing ignorance, arrogance, and political opportunism](https://substack.com/redirect/92f93690-fd2d-4ae0-b437-39d31811ac85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And leading this parade of fools over the past decade has been Donald J. Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump turned vaccine skepticism from a fringe hobby into a national MAGA pastime. Trump mocked experts, shrugged off basic science, and treated the collective intelligence of the American people as a matter for social media polls.
In turn, millions of gullible conservatives, seeing a figure of authority champion nonsense, concluded that centuries of medical knowledge were optional. Because as we've seen repeatedly under Trump, many of the Old Orange Man's staunchest supporters would rather die spectacularly than read or embrace a peer reviewed scientific study.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's be clear. Measles is not a benign childhood inconvenience. It is a virus that infects nine out of ten susceptible people it encounters. Measles causes pneumonia, brain inflammation, and death.

Trump's HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Junior has only added to the misery. Fueled by his insanity, countless vaccine conspiracy nutjobs have hijacked school boards, screamed about "freedom" and "liberty," and loosened vaccine requirements.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In several bright Republican red school districts, the measles vaccine is optional. So, vaccination rates have fallen.
Medical experts point out the math is simple. When more than 95% of a community is vaccinated, that community reaches herd immunity. At that point, an infectious disease has a difficult time spreading. In dozens of U.S. counties, particularly in MAGA areas like West Texas, the rate has dropped to 80%.
So, measles is now spreading and stalking parts of the United States like a vengeful spirit. And the only crime of most of the victims - predominantly children and young adults - is having MAGA parents who believed that "alternative facts" somehow conferred immunity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Newark is emblematic of the broader disaster. A single carrier in a crowded terminal can spark an outbreak thousands of miles from home. Airports, schools, and community centers are now cell culture plates of stupidity.
The remedy is simple, painfully obvious, and tragically resisted: vaccinate. Vaccinate your children. Vaccinate yourself. Stop treating centuries of medical science as a suggestion and recognize that the MMR vaccine is safer than ignorance, more effective than arrogance, and infinitely preferable to death.
Unfortunately, vanity and sheer foolishness now pass for national character. [Trump and his devoted followers have made anti-intellectualism a lifestyle choice](https://substack.com/redirect/949237cf-50c3-4025-b599-c9172aaa3751?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The question is whether we will allow our nation to be consumed by the vast cluelessness of the Trumpian masses. Or whether we will remember, as we did for decades, that vaccines exist not for politics or pride but for life itself.
The MMR vaccine is safe, effective, and better than a fever, rash, and visit to the morgue.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is no grand conspiracy. There is no secret poison. There is only science -- and the relentless stupidity of those who choose to ignore it.
Don't ignore it. Get vaccinated.
Newark Airport is challenging enough.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13e82493-5d53-41e5-b060-2d4ab1866ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I’m running for Governor of Texas
body:
Greg Abbott works for his billionaire donors. I’m running to fight for you.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter, I often think about something my grandmother used to tell me:
_“No te dejes.”_
Don’t let them push you around. Fight back.
That lesson has guided me my entire life, from the Rio Grande Valley to the state legislature — and it’s why I’m announcing that **I’m running for Governor of Texas.**
Because right now, Texans are in the fight of our lives for our kids, our schools, and our future. And Greg Abbott has chosen a side: the billionaires, the special interests, the big corporations, and the wealthiest donors who bankroll him.
Abbott has given away nearly a billion taxpayer dollars in contracts to his campaign donors and is still scheming to rip funding away from our neighborhood schools to give to private interests. **That’s corruption, plain and simple — _and it’s time we fight back._**
If you’re ready to take our state back from Abbott and his billionaire donors, I’m asking you to be _one of the first_ to step up:
**[Peter, will you become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a donation of any amount right now? With your support, we can prove we’re ready for this fight.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_welcome_launch.m5e2lT&refcode=em20260101-354&amount=5&t=1&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_welcome_launch.m5e2lT&amount=5&refcode=em20260101-354&t=2&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)
I grew up in Brownsville public schools — schools where no one had much, but we had each other. My parents were legal-aid lawyers representing farmworkers and families who had nowhere else to turn. My mom was born in Mexico; my dad was the first in his family to go to college. We lived in Mission, Texas.
We moved so my dad could go to Georgetown Law. My mom worked to help put my dad through school. My mom eventually decided to go to law school herself.
Then, our family came home to South Texas so my parents could fight for people like the ones they’d grown up alongside.
That’s where I learned that doing right by others isn’t charity — **it’s duty.**
I became a lawyer to fight for workers and families. And when my son’s elementary school — steps from the Capitol — was threatened with closure, I ran for the Austin school board. We stopped a corporate takeover of our public schools. Our schools passed accountability standards for the first time in history.
A few years later, I ran for the Texas House to keep fighting for our kids and our classrooms. Since then, I’ve:
> ✅ Passed a first-of-its-kind law creating Public Benefit Corporations so Texas businesses can do well and do good.
>
> ✅ Secured nearly a billion dollars in federal funds for health care in Travis County.
>
> ✅ Led the charge to stop Abbott’s voucher schemes and defend public schools — beating him five times in a row.
>
> ✅ Helped organize the Democratic walkout that blocked Abbott’s voter suppression bill and protected Texans’ right to vote.
Every fight has reinforced what my grandmother taught me. I can still hear her voice telling me: _No te dejes._
**Never back down.**
Greg Abbott’s corruption runs deep, and the billionaires he serves will spend whatever it takes to keep him in power. But I’m not afraid of a fight, and with your help we can finally beat him.
If you believe in a Texas where every child can learn in a great public school, where families can afford health care, where every worker can earn a living wage, and where the government serves the people, not the powerful, _then I need you in this fight from day one._
**[Peter, if you’re with me, I’m asking you to be a Founding Donor to my campaign for Governor of Texas. Contribute $5, $25, $50, or more now.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_welcome_launch.m5e2lT&refcode=em20260101-354&amount=5&t=3&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_welcome_launch.m5e2lT&amount=5&refcode=em20260101-354&t=22&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)
**We can do this. We’re Texans.** We do hard things — and we’ve never been afraid of a fight.
_No te dejes._
With gratitude and determination,
Gina Hinojosa
Candidate for Governor of Texas
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_welcome_launch.m5e2lT&refcode=em20260101-354&amount=5&t=23&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em2025-welcome&t=24&refcode2=354_299639_ta2xc4&akid=354%2E299639%2Eta2xc4)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

Because right now, Texans are in the fight of our lives for our kids, our schools, and our future. And Greg Abbott has chosen a side: the billionaires, the special interests, the big corporations, and the wealthiest donors who bankroll him. Abbott has given away nearly a billion taxpayer dollars in contracts to his campaign donors and is still scheming to rip funding away from our neighborhood schools to give to private interests. That’s corruption, plain and simple — and it’s time we fight back. If you’re ready to take our state back from Abbott and his billionaire donors, I’m asking you to be one of the first to step up: I grew up in Brownsville public schools — schools where no one had much, but we had each other. My parents were legal-aid lawyers representing farmworkers and families who had nowhere else to turn. My mom was born in Mexico; my dad was the first in his family to go to college. We lived in Mission, Texas. We moved so my dad could go to Georgetown Law. My mom worked to help put my dad through school. My mom eventually decided to go to law school herself. Then, our family came home to South Texas so my parents could fight for people like the ones they’d grown up alongside. That’s where I learned that doing right by others isn’t charity — it’s duty. I became a lawyer to fight for workers and families. And when my son’s elementary school — steps from the Capitol — was threatened with closure, I ran for the Austin school board. We stopped a corporate takeover of our public schools. Our schools passed accountability standards for the first time in history. A few years later, I ran for the Texas House to keep fighting for our kids and our classrooms. Since then, I’ve: ✅ Passed a first-of-its-kind law creating Public Benefit Corporations so Texas businesses can do well and do good. ✅ Secured nearly a billion dollars in federal funds for health care in Travis County. ✅ Led the charge to stop Abbott’s voucher schemes and defend public schools — beating him five times in a row. ✅ Helped organize the Democratic walkout that blocked Abbott’s voter suppression bill and protected Texans’ right to vote. Every fight has reinforced what my grandmother taught me. I can still hear her voice telling me: No te dejes. Never back down. Greg Abbott’s corruption runs deep, and the billionaires he serves will spend whatever it takes to keep him in power. But I’m not afraid of a fight, and with your help we can finally beat him. If you believe in a Texas where every child can learn in a great public school, where families can afford health care, where every worker can earn a living wage, and where the government serves the people, not the powerful, then I need you in this fight from day one. We can do this. We’re Texans. We do hard things — and we’ve never been afraid of a fight. No te dejes. With gratitude and determination, Gina Hinojosa Candidate for Governor of Texas Email us: mailto:info@ginafortexas.com

Happy New Year Team,

Tracy and I just enjoyed our first 2026 sunset. It is an honor to serve the amazing people in Virginia's 5th Congressional District.

My incredible team and I helped many of our constituents at home and abroad overcome challenges in 2025. As our nation celebrates 250 years, we are fired up to help even more people this year.[ I am proud to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election this year. ](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TyqaKg0KqshjEiw7vYnN9CwEsohOi3ekLPskYqAXdw17YvdohblddBOXQX8m8ib-M19_oHDDzl7fsUHXzcmPkxilx1nry_c4v9Y84iqYgbIVBSpsnFJVIxdmW3e-ORhjhu_PEtzKn7adoB5KXI0-mjHpR10V7HMJYEbaR6JG_AGKiqOOVPxxToHr7Z-x5a8M&c=8mGU61CTkMqSEv4Z0uocN2_VGGvR0b6Bzy_aLkMDmeTS2z6NjJ1RBA==&ch=_v-Oj6l6sd5q4nQtYzuDrCsGhV1Qy8SVpjKbs_E9_3XAG2bwwsv9-g==) May God continue to bless you and your family in 2026!

The American Dream Act
---
| |
---
| Home Ownership is still the American Dream, but it has been slipping out of reach for young people! We are working on a bill, The American Dream Act, to help with low cost housing availability. This bill will create a 5 year moratorium on capitol gains for someone age 65 or older who sells a rental home valued between $250k and $500k to a first time buyer. The majority of first time buyers are under age 32. This option will not be available to companies and or non-citizens. What are your thoughts?
---
| As Your Congressman, I'm Working For You
---
| 1.Historic Tax Relief for Families Permanent lower tax rates: 15% tax cut for Americans earning $15,000-$80,000 per year.
2.No Tax on Social Security For the first time ever, 88% of seniors won't pay taxes on their Social Security.
3.No Tax On Tips Four million tipped workers will see their incomes boosted by $1,300 per year.
4.No Tax on Overtime Over 80 million hourly workers will see their income boosted by $1,400 per year.
5.Enhancing the Child Tax Credit The new boosted child tax credit saves the average family of four $4,400 per year.
6.Modernizing Our Military Historic investments in our military provide our men and women in uniform the resources they need to keep America safe.
7.Investing in Border Security Finishing Trump's border wall and hiring 18,000 new border officers in the largest single border security investment in history.
8.Lowering Energy Costs Increasing American production of crucial energy sources and making long-term investments to secure American energy dominance.
9.Protecting Medicaid for the Most Vulnerable Eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse from Medicaid and reinvesting in rural health.
10.More Money in Your Pocket Boosts take-home pay for hardworking families by $10,000 per year.

Promises Made Promises Kept

| Why do Democrats Support Illegals Over Fellow Americans?

| |
---
| Here are some of the Punishments for entering a country illegally:

* Russia: 2 years in a labor camp
* India: 8 years in prison
* Pakistan: 10 years in prison
* Singapore: 6 months in prison
* China: Up to 1 year in detention, fines, and possible forced repatriation.
* Australia: Up to 5 years in prison and mandatory detention before deportation
* Mexico: Up to 2 years in prison for first-time illegal entry. Up to 10 years if repeated or tied to other offenses.
* Saudi Arabia: Up to 2 years in prison, heavy fines, and whipping has historically been used.
* North Korea: Severe detention, forced labor, torture, and potential execution, treating such acts as grave political crimes against the state.

* Stupid USA Democrat Policy: You get a Congrats, free housing ie. $500/ night tax payer funded hotel room, free healthcare, free food, and free cash.

Thank God President Trump secured our border. Deportation is not "racist" it's protecting our country. We estimate 20 million illegal criminal aliens crossed our border under the Biden administration. They have overwhelmed our resources and many have robbed, raped, and killed American citizens. So far Trump has deported 2.5 million illegals. That number is not even close to how many illegals Bush and Obama deported.

Morale is up, recruitment is up, destructive DEI policies are gone, and merit is back where it belongs. Thank you for your professionalism and thank you for keeping all Americans safe at home and abroad. clean_body: | | | | == == | Happy New Year 2026! | | | | | | Happy New Year Team, Tracy and I just enjoyed our first 2026 sunset. It is an honor to serve the amazing people in Virginia's 5th Congressional District. My incredible team and I helped many of our constituents at home and abroad overcome challenges in 2025. As our nation celebrates 250 years, we are fired up to help even more people this year.== May God continue to bless you and your family in 2026! | This Song 'The Blessing' Gives Me Hope and Motivation for 2026! | == Tracy and I had the privilege of attending the powerful Charlie Kirk memorial event hosted by Turning Point USA in Arizona. We were deeply moved by the inspirational worship songs, with lyrics drawn straight from Scripture that reminded us of God's enduring truth and hope. If this song The Blessing touches your heart like it did ours, please share it far and wide! == Vote John Thomas January 6 Special Election | Please ask friends in State Senate SD 15 to vote for John Thomas January 6. == The American Dream Act | | | Home Ownership is still the American Dream, but it has been slipping out of reach for young people! We are working on a bill, The American Dream Act, to help with low cost housing availability. This bill will create a 5 year moratorium on capitol gains for someone age 65 or older who sells a rental home valued between $250k and $500k to a first time buyer. The majority of first time buyers are under age 32. This option will not be available to companies and or non-citizens. What are your thoughts? | As Your Congressman, I'm Working For You | 1.Historic Tax Relief for Families Permanent lower tax rates: 15% tax cut for Americans earning $15,000-$80,000 per year. 2.No Tax on Social Security For the first time ever, 88% of seniors won't pay taxes on their Social Security. 3.No Tax On Tips Four million tipped workers will see their incomes boosted by $1,300 per year. 4.No Tax on Overtime Over 80 million hourly workers will see their income boosted by $1,400 per year. 5.Enhancing the Child Tax Credit The new boosted child tax credit saves the average family of four $4,400 per year. 6.Modernizing Our Military Historic investments in our military provide our men and women in uniform the resources they need to keep America safe. 7.Investing in Border Security Finishing Trump's border wall and hiring 18,000 new border officers in the largest single border security investment in history. 8.Lowering Energy Costs Increasing American production of crucial energy sources and making long-term investments to secure American energy dominance. 9.Protecting Medicaid for the Most Vulnerable Eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse from Medicaid and reinvesting in rural health. 10.More Money in Your Pocket Boosts take-home pay for hardworking families by $10,000 per year. Promises Made Promises Kept | Why do Democrats Support Illegals Over Fellow Americans? | | | Here are some of the Punishments for entering a country illegally: Russia: 2 years in a labor camp India: 8 years in prison Pakistan: 10 years in prison Singapore: 6 months in prison China: Up to 1 year in detention, fines, and possible forced repatriation. Australia: Up to 5 years in prison and mandatory detention before deportation Mexico: Up to 2 years in prison for first-time illegal entry. Up to 10 years if repeated or tied to other offenses. Saudi Arabia: Up to 2 years in prison, heavy fines, and whipping has historically been used. North Korea: Severe detention, forced labor, torture, and potential execution, treating such acts as grave political crimes against the state. Stupid USA Democrat Policy: You get a Congrats, free housing ie. $500/ night tax payer funded hotel room, free healthcare, free food, and free cash. Thank God President Trump secured our border. Deportation is not "racist" it's protecting our country. We estimate 20 million illegal criminal aliens crossed our border under the Biden administration. They have overwhelmed our resources and many have robbed, raped, and killed American citizens. So far Trump has deported 2.5 million illegals. That number is not even close to how many illegals Bush and Obama deported. | | | Thank You Councilwoman Stephanie Reed for Loving Lynchburg | | == | After attending church in Lynchburg, Va I met up with these two famous Patriots for lunch. Thank you == for loving the people of Lynchburg and for being a voice of reason on City Council. It is an honor to work with you and others to solve problems for the people. Thank you Dale Reed, a fellow veteran, for your service and efforts to protect children online through your company Cloudfit Software. == Massive Fraud in Minnesota, Are you Sick of It? | == I'm on the House Oversight Committee and we are bringing in Tim Walz to answer for the massive fraud in Minnesota. There will be two hearings to get answers and accountability. Jan 7 -> MN State Reps Feb 10 -> Tim Walz and AG Keith Ellison We will expose failures and identify solutions so we can legislate so this DOES NOT happen again. "...The U.S. Department of Justice is actively investigating, prosecuting, and charging fraudsters who have stolen billions from taxpayers, and Congress has a duty to conduct rigorous oversight of this heist and enact stronger safeguards to prevent fraud in taxpayer-funded programs, as well as strong sanctions to hold offenders accountable." Chairman James Comer == Thank You Goochland Sheriff Creasey for the Mention | | Thank you == for the mention and thank you for all you and your team do to keep us safe! | Department of War Christmas Party | | | | | | | I celebrated the holidays with many fellow war fighters at the == Christmas party at the Pentagon. == == chairman General John Daniel "Raizin"Caine, and the entire force are doing an incredible job. Morale is up, recruitment is up, destructive DEI policies are gone, and merit is back where it belongs. Thank you for your professionalism and thank you for keeping all Americans safe at home and abroad. It is an honor to represent Virginia's 5th Congressional District and it is an honor to serve on the ==. God bless you and God bless America! | SNAP Can No Longer Be Used For Junk Food | | | Thank You Midas for supporting Goochland Cares! | | Christmas With Family | | Powhatan GOP Christmas Party | | | | Powhatan GOP Chair Dave Robinson and former Chair Steve Jenkins. | | | | | | | | | Delegate Lee Ware | | Rich Herarra WRVA | Met up with Rich Hererra of the WRVA morning show and his son. == | Governor Glenn Youngkin Portrait Unveiling | | Thank you Governor Glenn Youngkin for your service to Virginia! | | | | | | | | | White House Christmas Tours | | | We have the best team. Thank you to Ramona Christian for doing an incredible job leading White House tours for over 200 people from all over the 5th Congressional District. Thank you for always doing an incredible job in all that you do. | | | | What do you think? | 5th District GOP Christmas Party | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We had a wonderful Christmas Party in Appomattox County with amazing people from all over the 5th Congressional District. name: Team Cooper
subject: $1 for 1/1❓
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
Hi Peter, We hope you’re having a great start to 2026! Before we say anything else, we want to say a huge THANK YOU for everyone’s support in 2025, especially in the last few days of our critical filing deadline push. We wouldn’t be here without you. **[New Year’s Day is the perfect time to make a resolution, so if you’ve been waiting for the right time to give to this campaign, we want to make it as easy as possible for you to make an impact. What do you think about committing to a donation of JUST $1 right now?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3653?amount=1&t=7&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)** | [DONATE $1 A MONTH](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3654?t=8&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
---
[DONATE $1](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3655?t=9&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
---
A gift of $1 (just 4 quarters!) might not seem like a ton, but this is the kind of contribution that can really add up to make a difference for our campaign. You see, this is a movement by and for people — real people, who give what they can and when they can, to take on the GOP mega-money machine.
A dollar now is exactly the kind of investment that can change the course of a race like ours.
Peter, can we count you in?
**[Click here to make your $1 donation to celebrate 1/1!](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3653?amount=1&t=10&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)**
Happy New Year, and thanks so much!
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=243%2E124072%2ELdIRVU)

**Patriot,** **I’m furious.** Senator Tim Kaine, a sitting U.S. Senator and Hillary Clinton’s old running mate, just said our natural rights do not come from God. **He claims they come from the government!** That’s right, in Jefferson’s Virginia of all places, the sitting U.S. Senator has apparently never even read the Declaration of Independence. **It’s disgusting. ** **It’s outrageous.** **But it’s also the OFFICIAL MOTTO of today’s** **Democrat Party. ** Every right we hold — life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness — is inherent. They are not handed out by politicians or bureaucrats—but endowed to us by our Creator. Kaine doesn’t just insult every American who believes in God—he openly shows the ignorance and arrogance of Democrats when it comes to our founding values!
---

**We cannot stay silent. Patriots across Virginia and the nation must stand up and REJECT** **this revisionist history. ** If you believe our rights belong to the people, that government exists to serve us and not the other way around, you have to act **NOW**. **Sign your name** **TODAY** and tell Tim Kaine he’s **DEAD WRONG **about our natural rights. Let him know Virginians **WILL NOT TOLERATE** leaders who put government power above freedom. Patriot, your action right now matters more than ever. Every signature sends a message that you will not stand by while big-government radicals undermine our Republic. **Sign your name today. Make your voice heard. Do not let Kaine and the Left destroy what generations of Americans fought for.**
